116: 	var backend_profiles: Dictionary = targets.get("backend_profiles", {})
117: 	var backend_profile: Dictionary = _resolve_backend_profile(backend_profiles, backend_tag)
118: 	var unique_colors_min_scale: float = clampf(float(backend_profile.get("unique_colors_min_scale", 1.0)), 0.5, 2.0)
119: 	var luma_range_padding: float = clampf(float(backend_profile.get("luma_range_padding", 0.0)), 0.0, 0.3)
120: 	var backend_max_opaque_drop: float = maxf(0.0, float(backend_profile.get("max_opaque_ratio_drop", 1.0)))
121: 	var backend_max_unique_drop: float = maxf(0.0, float(backend_profile.get("max_unique_color_drop_ratio", 1.0)))
122: 	var backend_max_luma_delta: float = maxf(0.0, float(backend_profile.get("max_luma_delta", 1.0)))
123: 
124: 	var report: Dictionary = {
125: 		"generated_at_unix": Time.get_unix_time_from_system(),
126: 		"channel": str(targets.get("channel", "unknown")),
127: 		"backend_tag": backend_tag,
128: 		"strategy": {
129: 			"name": strategy_name,
130: 			"template": strategy_template,
131: 			"errors": strategy_errors,
132: 		},
133: 		"precision": {
134: 			"sample_rounds": sample_rounds,
135: 			"max_opaque_ratio_stddev": max_opaque_ratio_stddev,
136: 			"max_luma_stddev": max_luma_stddev,
137: 			"max_unique_color_stddev_ratio": max_unique_color_stddev_ratio,
138: 		},
139: 		"blockers": 0,
140: 		"warnings": 0,
141: 		"checked": 0,
142: 		"passed": 0,
143: 		"snapshots": {},
144: 		"trend": {
145: 			"regressions": 0,
146: 			"opaque_ratio_drops": {},
147: 			"unique_color_drop_ratios": {},
148: 			"luma_deltas": {},
149: 		},
150: 		"whitelist": {
151: 			"hits": 0,
152: 			"max_hits": whitelist_max_hits,
153: 			"ratio": 0.0,
154: 			"max_ratio": whitelist_max_ratio,
155: 			"stale_run_threshold": stale_run_threshold,
156: 			"tighten_margin_ratio": tighten_margin_ratio,
157: 			"expire_idle_runs": expire_idle_runs,
158: 			"auto_reclaim_hit_streak": auto_reclaim_hit_streak,
159: 			"max_expired_entries": max_expired_entries,
160: 			"max_reclaim_candidates": max_reclaim_candidates,
161: 			"streaks": {},
162: 			"lifecycle": {},
163: 			"convergence_suggestions": [],
164: 			"expired_entries": [],
165: 			"reclaim_candidates": [],
166: 			"items": [],
167: 		},
168: 		"backend_attribution": {
169: 			"backend_tag": backend_tag,
170: 			"required_backends": required_backends,
171: 			"regressions": 0,
172: 			"backend_specific_regressions": 0,
173: 			"max_backend_specific_regressions": max_backend_specific_regressions,
174: 			"unattributed_regressions": 0,
175: 			"max_unattributed_regressions": max_unattributed_regressions,
176: 			"items": [],
177: 		},
178: 		"cross_version": {
179: 			"checked": 0,
180: 			"violations": 0,
181: 			"max_violations": int(cross_version_baseline.get("max_violations", 0)),
182: 			"items": [],
183: 		},
184: 		"layers": {},
185: 		"release_manifest": {
186: 			"run_mode": run_mode,
187: 			"strategy": strategy_name,
188: 			"template": strategy_template,
189: 			"required_strategies": release_gate_templates.get("required_strategies", []),
190: 			"required_strategy_bindings": release_gate_templates.get("required_strategy_bindings", {}),
191: 			"ci_mode_bindings": release_gate_templates.get("ci_mode_bindings", {}),
192: 			"max_checklist_failures": int(release_gate_templates.get("max_checklist_failures", 0)),
193: 			"checklist_failures": 0,
194: 			"errors": [],
195: 			"checklist_items": [],
196: 		},
197: 		"backend_matrix": {
198: 			"backend_tag": backend_tag,
199: 			"required_backend_matrix": backend_matrix_governance.get("required_backend_matrix", []),
200: 			"declared_backend_matrix": _parse_csv_env(OS.get_environment("VISUAL_SNAPSHOT_BACKEND_MATRIX")),
201: 			"required_run_modes": backend_matrix_governance.get("required_run_modes", []),
202: 			"missing_backend_matrix": [],
203: 			"missing_run_mode_bindings": [],
204: 			"max_missing_backend_matrix": int(backend_matrix_governance.get("max_missing_backend_matrix", 0)),
205: 			"max_missing_run_mode_bindings": int(backend_matrix_governance.get("max_missing_run_mode_bindings", 0)),
206: 		},
207: 		"approval": {
208: 			"required_report_sections": approval_workflow.get("required_report_sections", []),
209: 			"require_zero_blockers": bool(approval_workflow.get("require_zero_blockers", true)),
210: 			"require_zero_warnings_for_strategies": approval_workflow.get("require_zero_warnings_for_strategies", []),
211: 			"max_approval_failures": int(approval_workflow.get("max_approval_failures", 0)),
212: 			"approval_failures": 0,
213: 			"checklist_items": [],
214: 		},
215: 		"approval_audit": {
216: 			"history_file": str(approval_audit_trail.get("history_file", "user://visual_snapshot_approval_history.json")),
217: 			"max_entries": int(approval_audit_trail.get("max_entries", 80)),
218: 			"required_run_modes": approval_audit_trail.get("required_run_modes", []),
219: 			"required_backends": approval_audit_trail.get("required_backends", []),
220: 			"require_unique_pipeline_id": bool(approval_audit_trail.get("require_unique_pipeline_id", true)),
221: 			"max_missing_pipeline_id": int(approval_audit_trail.get("max_missing_pipeline_id", 0)),
222: 			"max_history_trace_failures": int(approval_audit_trail.get("max_history_trace_failures", 0)),
223: 			"pipeline_id": "",
224: 			"history_entries": 0,
225: 			"missing_run_modes": [],
226: 			"missing_backends": [],
227: 			"duplicate_pipeline_ids": [],
228: 			"trace_failures": 0,
229: 			"missing_pipeline_id_count": 0,
230: 			"items": [],
231: 		},
232: 		"approval_archive": {
233: 			"archive_file": str(approval_history_archive.get("archive_file", "user://visual_snapshot_approval_archive.json")),
234: 			"max_entries": int(approval_history_archive.get("max_entries", 240)),
235: 			"aggregation_window": int(approval_history_archive.get("aggregation_window", 80)),
236: 			"required_backends": approval_history_archive.get("required_backends", []),
237: 			"required_run_modes": approval_history_archive.get("required_run_modes", []),
238: 			"max_missing_archive_backends": int(approval_history_archive.get("max_missing_archive_backends", 0)),
239: 			"max_missing_archive_run_modes": int(approval_history_archive.get("max_missing_archive_run_modes", 0)),
240: 			"max_backend_warning_delta": int(approval_history_archive.get("max_backend_warning_delta", 0)),
241: 			"max_backend_blocker_delta": int(approval_history_archive.get("max_backend_blocker_delta", 0)),
242: 			"max_archive_trace_failures": int(approval_history_archive.get("max_archive_trace_failures", 0)),
243: 			"history_entries": 0,
244: 			"window_entries": 0,
245: 			"missing_backends": [],
246: 			"missing_run_modes": [],
247: 			"backend_warning_delta": 0,
248: 			"backend_blocker_delta": 0,
249: 			"trace_failures": 0,
250: 			"items": [],
251: 		},
252: 		"approval_template": {
253: 			"run_mode": run_mode,
254: 			"template": approval_template_name,
255: 			"errors": approval_template_errors,
256: 		},
257: 		"release_candidate_tracking": {
258: 			"history_file": str(release_candidate_tracking.get("history_file", "user://visual_snapshot_approval_archive.json")),
259: 			"window": int(release_candidate_tracking.get("window", 40)),
260: 			"required_run_modes": release_candidate_tracking.get("required_run_modes", []),
261: 			"required_strategies": release_candidate_tracking.get("required_strategies", []),
262: 			"min_runs": int(release_candidate_tracking.get("min_runs", 1)),
263: 			"max_avg_warnings": float(release_candidate_tracking.get("max_avg_warnings", 1.0)),
264: 			"max_total_blockers": int(release_candidate_tracking.get("max_total_blockers", 0)),
265: 			"max_tracking_failures": int(release_candidate_tracking.get("max_tracking_failures", 0)),
266: 			"matching_runs": 0,
267: 			"avg_warnings": 0.0,
268: 			"total_blockers": 0,
269: 			"tracking_failures": 0,
270: 			"items": [],
271: 		},
272: 		"release_candidate_score": {
273: 			"history_file": str(release_candidate_scoring.get("history_file", "user://visual_snapshot_approval_archive.json")),
274: 			"window": int(release_candidate_scoring.get("window", 60)),
275: 			"required_run_modes": release_candidate_scoring.get("required_run_modes", []),
276: 			"required_strategies": release_candidate_scoring.get("required_strategies", []),
277: 			"min_runs": int(release_candidate_scoring.get("min_runs", 2)),
278: 			"weights": release_candidate_scoring.get("weights", {}),
279: 			"normalizers": release_candidate_scoring.get("normalizers", {}),
280: 			"grade_bands": release_candidate_scoring.get("grade_bands", {}),
281: 			"min_score_for_release_blocking": float(release_candidate_scoring.get("min_score_for_release_blocking", 80.0)),
282: 			"max_score_failures": int(release_candidate_scoring.get("max_score_failures", 0)),
283: 			"matching_runs": 0,
284: 			"score": 0.0,
285: 			"grade": "D",
286: 			"score_failures": 0,
287: 			"items": [],
288: 		},
289: 		"approval_dashboard": {
290: 			"required_sections": approval_convergence_dashboard.get("required_sections", []),
291: 			"required_run_modes": approval_convergence_dashboard.get("required_run_modes", []),
292: 			"max_open_warnings": int(approval_convergence_dashboard.get("max_open_warnings", 3)),
293: 			"max_open_blockers": int(approval_convergence_dashboard.get("max_open_blockers", 0)),
294: 			"max_dashboard_failures": int(approval_convergence_dashboard.get("max_dashboard_failures", 0)),
295: 			"dashboard_failures": 0,
296: 			"items": [],
297: 		},
298: 		"items": [],
299: 	}
300: 
301: 	var snapshots: Dictionary = targets.get("snapshots", {})
302: 	if snapshots.is_empty():
303: 		_push_result(report, "global", "missing_snapshots", false, "visual_snapshot_targets.json snapshots is empty")
304: 		return report
305: 
306: 	for strategy_error in strategy_errors:
307: 		_push_result(report, "global", "strategy_orchestration_invalid", false, strategy_error)
308: 	for approval_error in approval_template_errors:
309: 		_push_result(report, "global", "approval_threshold_template_invalid", false, approval_error)
310: 
311: 	for required_id in required_snapshot_ids:
312: 		if not snapshots.has(required_id):
313: 			_push_result(report, "global", "required_snapshot_missing", false, "required snapshot '%s' not found in targets" % required_id)
314: 
315: 	var min_snapshots: int = int(thresholds.get("min_snapshots", 1))
316: 	var max_failures: int = int(thresholds.get("max_failures", 0))
317: 	var max_trend_regressions: int = int(thresholds.get("max_trend_regressions", 0))
318: 	var max_opaque_ratio_drop: float = minf(float(thresholds.get("max_opaque_ratio_drop", 1.0)), backend_max_opaque_drop)
319: 	var max_unique_color_drop_ratio: float = minf(float(thresholds.get("max_unique_color_drop_ratio", 1.0)), backend_max_unique_drop)
320: 	var max_luma_delta: float = minf(float(thresholds.get("max_luma_delta", 1.0)), backend_max_luma_delta)
321: 
322: 	DirAccess.make_dir_recursive_absolute(SNAPSHOT_DIR)
323: 	var allowed_capture_modes: Array[String] = _resolve_allowed_capture_modes(allowed_capture_modes_map, backend_tag)
324: 
325: 	var passed_snapshots: int = 0
326: 	for snapshot_id_var in snapshots.keys():
327: 		var snapshot_id: String = str(snapshot_id_var)
328: 		var row_variant: Variant = snapshots.get(snapshot_id, {})
329: 		if not (row_variant is Dictionary):
330: 			_push_result(report, snapshot_id, "invalid_snapshot_row", false, "snapshot row must be object")
331: 			continue
332: 
333: 		var row: Dictionary = row_variant
334: 		var capture_result: Dictionary = await _capture_snapshot(snapshot_id, row, sample_rounds)
335: 		if not bool(capture_result.get("ok", false)):
336: 			_push_result(report, snapshot_id, "capture_failed", false, str(capture_result.get("message", "capture failed")))
337: 			continue
338: 
339: 		var metrics: Dictionary = capture_result.get("metrics", {})
340: 		var snapshot_metrics: Dictionary = report.get("snapshots", {})
341: 		snapshot_metrics[snapshot_id] = metrics
342: 		report["snapshots"] = snapshot_metrics
343: 
344: 		var opaque_ratio: float = float(metrics.get("opaque_ratio", 0.0))
345: 		var unique_colors: int = int(metrics.get("unique_colors", 0))
346: 		var avg_luma: float = float(metrics.get("avg_luma", 0.0))
347: 		var capture_mode: String = str(metrics.get("capture_mode", "unknown"))
348: 
349: 		var opaque_ratio_min: float = float(row.get("opaque_ratio_min", 0.0))
350: 		var unique_colors_min: int = int(ceil(float(row.get("unique_colors_min", 0)) * unique_colors_min_scale))
351: 		var luma_min: float = clampf(float(row.get("luma_min", 0.0)) - luma_range_padding, 0.0, 1.0)
352: 		var luma_max: float = clampf(float(row.get("luma_max", 1.0)) + luma_range_padding, 0.0, 1.0)
353: 
354: 		var snapshot_passed: bool = true
355: 		if opaque_ratio < opaque_ratio_min:
356: 			snapshot_passed = false
357: 			_push_result(report, snapshot_id, "opaque_ratio_min", false, "opaque_ratio %.3f below min %.3f" % [opaque_ratio, opaque_ratio_min])
358: 		if unique_colors < unique_colors_min:
359: 			snapshot_passed = false
360: 			_push_result(report, snapshot_id, "unique_colors_min", false, "unique_colors %d below min %d" % [unique_colors, unique_colors_min])
361: 		if avg_luma < luma_min or avg_luma > luma_max:
362: 			snapshot_passed = false
363: 			_push_result(report, snapshot_id, "luma_range", false, "avg_luma %.3f out of range [%.3f, %.3f]" % [avg_luma, luma_min, luma_max])
364: 		if not allowed_capture_modes.is_empty() and not allowed_capture_modes.has(capture_mode):
365: 			snapshot_passed = false
366: 			_push_result(report, snapshot_id, "capture_mode_not_allowed", false, "capture_mode %s not allowed for backend %s" % [capture_mode, backend_tag])
367: 
368: 		var opaque_ratio_stddev: float = float(metrics.get("opaque_ratio_stddev", 0.0))
369: 		var luma_stddev: float = float(metrics.get("avg_luma_stddev", 0.0))
370: 		var unique_stddev_ratio: float = float(metrics.get("unique_color_stddev_ratio", 0.0))
371: 		if opaque_ratio_stddev > max_opaque_ratio_stddev:
372: 			snapshot_passed = false
373: 			_push_result(report, snapshot_id, "opaque_ratio_stddev", false, "opaque_ratio_stddev %.4f exceeds %.4f" % [opaque_ratio_stddev, max_opaque_ratio_stddev])
374: 		if luma_stddev > max_luma_stddev:
375: 			snapshot_passed = false
376: 			_push_result(report, snapshot_id, "luma_stddev", false, "avg_luma_stddev %.4f exceeds %.4f" % [luma_stddev, max_luma_stddev])
377: 		if unique_stddev_ratio > max_unique_color_stddev_ratio:
378: 			snapshot_passed = false
379: 			_push_result(report, snapshot_id, "unique_color_stddev_ratio", false, "unique_color_stddev_ratio %.4f exceeds %.4f" % [unique_stddev_ratio, max_unique_color_stddev_ratio])
380: 
381: 		var previous_snapshots: Dictionary = previous_report.get("snapshots", {})
382: 		var previous_metrics: Dictionary = previous_snapshots.get(snapshot_id, {})
383: 		if not previous_metrics.is_empty():
384: 			var prev_opaque_ratio: float = float(previous_metrics.get("opaque_ratio", opaque_ratio))
385: 			var prev_unique_colors: float = float(previous_metrics.get("unique_colors", unique_colors))
386: 			var prev_luma: float = float(previous_metrics.get("avg_luma", avg_luma))
387: 
388: 			var opaque_drop: float = maxf(0.0, prev_opaque_ratio - opaque_ratio)
389: 			var unique_drop_ratio: float = 0.0
390: 			if prev_unique_colors > 0.0:
391: 				unique_drop_ratio = maxf(0.0, (prev_unique_colors - float(unique_colors)) / prev_unique_colors)
392: 			var luma_delta: float = absf(prev_luma - avg_luma)
393: 			var whitelist_row: Dictionary = _resolve_snapshot_whitelist(diff_whitelist, backend_tag, snapshot_id)
394: 			var whitelist_reason: String = str(whitelist_row.get("reason", ""))
395: 			var effective_opaque_drop: float = max_opaque_ratio_drop
396: 			var effective_unique_drop: float = max_unique_color_drop_ratio
397: 			var effective_luma_delta: float = max_luma_delta
398: 			if whitelist_row.has("max_opaque_ratio_drop"):
399: 				effective_opaque_drop = maxf(effective_opaque_drop, float(whitelist_row.get("max_opaque_ratio_drop", effective_opaque_drop)))
400: 			if whitelist_row.has("max_unique_color_drop_ratio"):
401: 				effective_unique_drop = maxf(effective_unique_drop, float(whitelist_row.get("max_unique_color_drop_ratio", effective_unique_drop)))
402: 			if whitelist_row.has("max_luma_delta"):
403: 				effective_luma_delta = maxf(effective_luma_delta, float(whitelist_row.get("max_luma_delta", effective_luma_delta)))
404: 
405: 			var trend: Dictionary = report.get("trend", {})
406: 			var opaque_ratio_drops: Dictionary = trend.get("opaque_ratio_drops", {})
407: 			opaque_ratio_drops[snapshot_id] = opaque_drop
408: 			trend["opaque_ratio_drops"] = opaque_ratio_drops
409: 			var unique_color_drop_ratios: Dictionary = trend.get("unique_color_drop_ratios", {})
410: 			unique_color_drop_ratios[snapshot_id] = unique_drop_ratio
411: 			trend["unique_color_drop_ratios"] = unique_color_drop_ratios
412: 			var luma_deltas: Dictionary = trend.get("luma_deltas", {})
413: 			luma_deltas[snapshot_id] = luma_delta
414: 			trend["luma_deltas"] = luma_deltas
415: 			report["trend"] = trend
416: 
417: 			if opaque_drop > max_opaque_ratio_drop:
418: 				if opaque_drop <= effective_opaque_drop:
419: 					_register_whitelist_hit(report, snapshot_id, "opaque_ratio_drop", opaque_drop, max_opaque_ratio_drop, effective_opaque_drop, whitelist_reason)
420: 				else:
421: 					_push_warning(report, snapshot_id, "opaque_ratio_drop", "opaque_ratio drop %.3f exceeds %.3f" % [opaque_drop, effective_opaque_drop])
422: 					trend["regressions"] = int(trend.get("regressions", 0)) + 1
423: 					report["trend"] = trend
424: 			if unique_drop_ratio > max_unique_color_drop_ratio:
425: 				if unique_drop_ratio <= effective_unique_drop:
426: 					_register_whitelist_hit(report, snapshot_id, "unique_color_drop_ratio", unique_drop_ratio, max_unique_color_drop_ratio, effective_unique_drop, whitelist_reason)
427: 				else:
428: 					_push_warning(report, snapshot_id, "unique_color_drop_ratio", "unique_colors drop ratio %.3f exceeds %.3f" % [unique_drop_ratio, effective_unique_drop])
429: 					trend["regressions"] = int(trend.get("regressions", 0)) + 1
430: 					report["trend"] = trend
431: 			if luma_delta > max_luma_delta:
432: 				if luma_delta <= effective_luma_delta:
433: 					_register_whitelist_hit(report, snapshot_id, "luma_delta", luma_delta, max_luma_delta, effective_luma_delta, whitelist_reason)
434: 				else:
435: 					_push_warning(report, snapshot_id, "luma_delta", "luma delta %.3f exceeds %.3f" % [luma_delta, effective_luma_delta])
436: 					trend["regressions"] = int(trend.get("regressions", 0)) + 1
437: 					report["trend"] = trend
438: 
439: 		if snapshot_passed:
440: 			passed_snapshots += 1
441: 			_push_result(report, snapshot_id, "snapshot_metrics", true, "snapshot metrics within baseline")
442: 
443: 	if passed_snapshots < min_snapshots:
444: 		_push_result(report, "global", "min_snapshots", false, "passed snapshots %d below min_snapshots %d" % [passed_snapshots, min_snapshots])
445: 
446: 	for required_id in required_snapshot_ids:
447: 		var captured_snapshots: Dictionary = report.get("snapshots", {})
448: 		if not captured_snapshots.has(required_id):
449: 			_push_result(report, "global", "required_snapshot_not_captured", false, "required snapshot '%s' missing from report" % required_id)
450: 
451: 	var trend_row: Dictionary = report.get("trend", {})
452: 	var trend_regressions: int = int(trend_row.get("regressions", 0))
453: 	if trend_regressions > max_trend_regressions:
454: 		_push_result(report, "global", "max_trend_regressions_exceeded", false, "trend regressions %d exceeds %d" % [trend_regressions, max_trend_regressions])
455: 
456: 	var whitelist_row: Dictionary = report.get("whitelist", {})
457: 	var whitelist_hits: int = int(whitelist_row.get("hits", 0))
458: 	var whitelist_ratio: float = 0.0
459: 	if snapshots.size() > 0:
460: 		whitelist_ratio = float(whitelist_hits) / float(snapshots.size())
461: 	whitelist_row["ratio"] = whitelist_ratio
462: 	report["whitelist"] = whitelist_row
463: 	if whitelist_hits > whitelist_max_hits:
464: 		_push_result(report, "global", "whitelist_max_hits_exceeded", false, "whitelist hits %d exceeds %d" % [whitelist_hits, whitelist_max_hits])
465: 	if whitelist_ratio > whitelist_max_ratio:
466: 		_push_result(report, "global", "whitelist_max_ratio_exceeded", false, "whitelist ratio %.3f exceeds %.3f" % [whitelist_ratio, whitelist_max_ratio])
467: 
468: 	_evaluate_backend_attribution(report, backend_tag, required_backends, max_unattributed_regressions, max_backend_specific_regressions)
469: 	_evaluate_whitelist_convergence(report, previous_report, stale_run_threshold, tighten_margin_ratio, max_suggestions)
470: 	_evaluate_exception_lifecycle(report, previous_report, expire_idle_runs, auto_reclaim_hit_streak, max_expired_entries, max_reclaim_candidates)
471: 
472: 	_evaluate_cross_version_baseline(report, cross_version_baseline)
473: 	_evaluate_report_layers(report, report_layers, snapshots)
474: 	_evaluate_release_gate_templates(
475: 		report,
476: 		release_gate_templates,
477: 		targets.get("strategy_orchestration", {}),
478: 		strategy_name,
479: 		strategy_template,
480: 		run_mode
481: 	)
482: 	_evaluate_backend_matrix_governance(report, backend_matrix_governance, release_gate_templates, run_mode)
483: 	_evaluate_approval_workflow(report, approval_workflow, strategy_name)
484: 	_evaluate_approval_audit_trail(report, approval_audit_trail, strategy_name, run_mode, backend_tag)
485: 	_evaluate_approval_history_archive(report, approval_history_archive, strategy_name, run_mode, backend_tag)
486: 	_evaluate_release_candidate_tracking(report, release_candidate_tracking, run_mode)
487: 	_evaluate_release_candidate_score(report, release_candidate_scoring, run_mode)
488: 	_evaluate_approval_convergence_dashboard(report, approval_convergence_dashboard, run_mode)
489: 
490: 	var failures: int = int(report.get("blockers", 0))
491: 	if failures > max_failures:
492: 		_push_result(report, "global", "max_failures_exceeded", false, "blockers %d exceeds max_failures %d" % [failures, max_failures])
493: 
494: 	return report
495: 
496: 
497: func _register_whitelist_hit(
498: 	report: Dictionary,
499: 	snapshot_id: String,
500: 	rule_id: String,
501: 	actual: float,
502: 	default_limit: float,
503: 	effective_limit: float,
504: 	reason: String
505: ) -> void:
506: 	var whitelist_row: Dictionary = report.get("whitelist", {})
507: 	var items: Array = whitelist_row.get("items", [])
508: 	items.append(
509: 		{
510: 			"snapshot": snapshot_id,
511: 			"id": rule_id,
512: 			"actual": actual,
513: 			"default_limit": default_limit,
514: 			"effective_limit": effective_limit,
515: 			"reason": reason,
516: 		}
517: 	)
518: 	whitelist_row["items"] = items
519: 	whitelist_row["hits"] = int(whitelist_row.get("hits", 0)) + 1
520: 	report["whitelist"] = whitelist_row
521: 	var message: String = "%s %.3f exceeds default %.3f but allowed by whitelist %.3f" % [rule_id, actual, default_limit, effective_limit]
522: 	if not reason.is_empty():
523: 		message += " (%s)" % reason
524: 	_push_warning(report, snapshot_id, "%s_whitelisted" % rule_id, message)
525: 
526: 
527: func _evaluate_backend_attribution(
528: 	report: Dictionary,
529: 	backend_tag: String,
530: 	required_backends: Array[String],
531: 	max_unattributed_regressions: int,
532: 	max_backend_specific_regressions: int
533: ) -> void:
534: 	var attribution_row: Dictionary = report.get("backend_attribution", {})
535: 	var snapshot_metrics: Dictionary = report.get("snapshots", {})
536: 	var items: Array = report.get("items", [])
537: 
538: 	var regressions: int = 0
539: 	var backend_specific_regressions: int = 0
540: 	var unattributed_regressions: int = 0
541: 	var attribution_items: Array = []
542: 
543: 	for item in items:
544: 		if not (item is Dictionary):
545: 			continue
546: 		var row: Dictionary = item
547: 		if bool(row.get("passed", false)):
548: 			continue
549: 		if str(row.get("severity", "blocker")) != "warning":
550: 			continue
551: 		var rule_id: String = str(row.get("id", ""))
552: 		if rule_id != "opaque_ratio_drop" and rule_id != "unique_color_drop_ratio" and rule_id != "luma_delta":
553: 			continue
554: 
555: 		regressions += 1
556: 		var snapshot_id: String = str(row.get("snapshot", ""))
557: 		var capture_mode: String = "unknown"
558: 		if snapshot_metrics.has(snapshot_id):
559: 			var metric_row: Variant = snapshot_metrics.get(snapshot_id, {})
560: 			if metric_row is Dictionary:
561: 				capture_mode = str(metric_row.get("capture_mode", "unknown"))
562: 
563: 		var attribution: String = "unattributed"
564: 		if capture_mode.begins_with("fallback_"):
565: 			attribution = backend_tag
566: 			backend_specific_regressions += 1
567: 		else:
568: 			unattributed_regressions += 1
569: 
570: 		attribution_items.append({
571: 			"snapshot": snapshot_id,
572: 			"id": rule_id,
573: 			"capture_mode": capture_mode,
574: 			"attribution": attribution,
575: 		})
576: 
577: 	attribution_row["backend_tag"] = backend_tag
578: 	attribution_row["required_backends"] = required_backends
579: 	attribution_row["regressions"] = regressions
580: 	attribution_row["backend_specific_regressions"] = backend_specific_regressions
581: 	attribution_row["max_backend_specific_regressions"] = max_backend_specific_regressions
582: 	attribution_row["unattributed_regressions"] = unattributed_regressions
583: 	attribution_row["max_unattributed_regressions"] = max_unattributed_regressions
584: 	attribution_row["items"] = attribution_items
585: 	report["backend_attribution"] = attribution_row
586: 
587: 	if not required_backends.is_empty() and not required_backends.has(backend_tag):
588: 		_push_result(report, "global", "backend_not_allowed", false, "backend %s is not listed in backend_attribution.required_backends" % backend_tag)
589: 
590: 	if unattributed_regressions > max_unattributed_regressions:
591: 		_push_result(report, "global", "max_unattributed_regressions_exceeded", false, "unattributed regressions %d exceeds %d" % [unattributed_regressions, max_unattributed_regressions])
592: 
593: 	if backend_specific_regressions > max_backend_specific_regressions:
594: 		_push_result(report, "global", "max_backend_specific_regressions_exceeded", false, "%s regressions %d exceeds %d" % [backend_tag, backend_specific_regressions, max_backend_specific_regressions])
595: 
596: 
597: func _evaluate_whitelist_convergence(
598: 	report: Dictionary,
599: 	previous_report: Dictionary,
600: 	stale_run_threshold: int,
601: 	tighten_margin_ratio: float,
602: 	max_suggestions: int
603: ) -> void:
604: 	var whitelist_row: Dictionary = report.get("whitelist", {})
605: 	var whitelist_items: Array = whitelist_row.get("items", [])
606: 	var previous_whitelist: Dictionary = previous_report.get("whitelist", {})
607: 	var previous_streaks: Dictionary = previous_whitelist.get("streaks", {})
608: 
609: 	var streaks: Dictionary = {}
610: 	var suggestions: Array = []
611: 
612: 	for item in whitelist_items:
613: 		if not (item is Dictionary):
614: 			continue
615: 		var row: Dictionary = item
616: 		var snapshot_id: String = str(row.get("snapshot", ""))
617: 		var rule_id: String = str(row.get("id", ""))
618: 		if snapshot_id.is_empty() or rule_id.is_empty():
619: 			continue
620: 
621: 		var key: String = "%s|%s" % [snapshot_id, rule_id]
622: 		var previous_streak: int = int(previous_streaks.get(key, 0))
623: 		var current_streak: int = previous_streak + 1
624: 		streaks[key] = current_streak
625: 
626: 		if current_streak < stale_run_threshold:
627: 			continue
628: 		if max_suggestions > 0 and suggestions.size() >= max_suggestions:
629: 			continue
630: 
631: 		var default_limit: float = float(row.get("default_limit", 0.0))
632: 		var effective_limit: float = float(row.get("effective_limit", default_limit))
633: 		if effective_limit <= default_limit:
634: 			continue
635: 
636: 		var suggested_limit: float = default_limit + (effective_limit - default_limit) * (1.0 - tighten_margin_ratio)
637: 		suggested_limit = clampf(suggested_limit, default_limit, effective_limit)
638: 		if suggested_limit >= effective_limit:
639: 			continue
640: 
641: 		suggestions.append({
642: 			"snapshot": snapshot_id,
643: 			"id": rule_id,
644: 			"reason": str(row.get("reason", "")),
645: 			"streak": current_streak,
646: 			"actual": float(row.get("actual", 0.0)),
647: 			"default_limit": default_limit,
648: 			"current_limit": effective_limit,
649: 			"suggested_limit": suggested_limit,
650: 		})
651: 
652: 	whitelist_row["streaks"] = streaks
653: 	whitelist_row["convergence_suggestions"] = suggestions
654: 	whitelist_row["stale_run_threshold"] = stale_run_threshold
655: 	whitelist_row["tighten_margin_ratio"] = tighten_margin_ratio
656: 	report["whitelist"] = whitelist_row
657: 
658: 
659: func _evaluate_exception_lifecycle(
660: 	report: Dictionary,
661: 	previous_report: Dictionary,
662: 	expire_idle_runs: int,
663: 	auto_reclaim_hit_streak: int,
664: 	max_expired_entries: int,
665: 	max_reclaim_candidates: int
666: ) -> void:
667: 	var whitelist_row: Dictionary = report.get("whitelist", {})
668: 	var current_items: Array = whitelist_row.get("items", [])
669: 	var convergence_items: Array = whitelist_row.get("convergence_suggestions", [])
670: 	var previous_whitelist: Dictionary = previous_report.get("whitelist", {})
671: 	var previous_lifecycle: Dictionary = previous_whitelist.get("lifecycle", {})
672: 
673: 	var current_items_by_key: Dictionary = {}
674: 	for item in current_items:
675: 		if not (item is Dictionary):
676: 			continue
677: 		var row: Dictionary = item
678: 		var snapshot_id: String = str(row.get("snapshot", ""))
679: 		var rule_id: String = str(row.get("id", ""))
680: 		if snapshot_id.is_empty() or rule_id.is_empty():
681: 			continue
682: 		var key: String = "%s|%s" % [snapshot_id, rule_id]
683: 		current_items_by_key[key] = row
684: 
685: 	var suggestions_by_key: Dictionary = {}
686: 	for item in convergence_items:
687: 		if not (item is Dictionary):
688: 			continue
689: 		var row: Dictionary = item
690: 		var snapshot_id: String = str(row.get("snapshot", ""))
691: 		var rule_id: String = str(row.get("id", ""))
692: 		if snapshot_id.is_empty() or rule_id.is_empty():
693: 			continue
694: 		var key: String = "%s|%s" % [snapshot_id, rule_id]
695: 		suggestions_by_key[key] = row
696: 
697: 	var all_keys: Dictionary = {}
698: 	for key_var in previous_lifecycle.keys():
699: 		all_keys[str(key_var)] = true
700: 	for key_var in current_items_by_key.keys():
701: 		all_keys[str(key_var)] = true
702: 
703: 	var lifecycle: Dictionary = {}
704: 	var expired_entries: Array = []
705: 	var reclaim_candidates: Array = []
706: 
707: 	for key_var in all_keys.keys():
708: 		var key: String = str(key_var)
709: 		var previous_row_variant: Variant = previous_lifecycle.get(key, {})
710: 		var previous_row: Dictionary = previous_row_variant if previous_row_variant is Dictionary else {}
711: 		var snapshot_id: String = str(previous_row.get("snapshot", ""))
712: 		var rule_id: String = str(previous_row.get("id", ""))
713: 		var hit_streak: int = int(previous_row.get("hit_streak", 0))
714: 		var idle_runs: int = int(previous_row.get("idle_runs", 0))
715: 		var total_hits: int = int(previous_row.get("total_hits", 0))
716: 		var last_status: String = "idle"
717: 
718: 		if current_items_by_key.has(key):
719: 			var current_row_variant: Variant = current_items_by_key.get(key, {})
720: 			var current_row: Dictionary = current_row_variant if current_row_variant is Dictionary else {}
721: 			snapshot_id = str(current_row.get("snapshot", snapshot_id))
722: 			rule_id = str(current_row.get("id", rule_id))
723: 			hit_streak += 1
724: 			idle_runs = 0
725: 			total_hits += 1
726: 			last_status = "hit"
727: 		else:
728: 			hit_streak = 0
729: 			idle_runs += 1
730: 			last_status = "idle"
731: 
732: 		var lifecycle_row: Dictionary = {
733: 			"snapshot": snapshot_id,
734: 			"id": rule_id,
735: 			"hit_streak": hit_streak,
736: 			"idle_runs": idle_runs,
737: 			"total_hits": total_hits,
738: 			"last_status": last_status,
739: 		}
740: 		lifecycle[key] = lifecycle_row
741: 
742: 		if total_hits > 0 and idle_runs >= expire_idle_runs:
743: 			expired_entries.append({
744: 				"key": key,
745: 				"snapshot": snapshot_id,
746: 				"id": rule_id,
747: 				"idle_runs": idle_runs,
748: 				"expire_idle_runs": expire_idle_runs,
749: 			})
750: 
751: 		if hit_streak >= auto_reclaim_hit_streak:
752: 			var candidate: Dictionary = {
753: 				"key": key,
754: 				"snapshot": snapshot_id,
755: 				"id": rule_id,
756: 				"hit_streak": hit_streak,
757: 				"auto_reclaim_hit_streak": auto_reclaim_hit_streak,
758: 			}
759: 			if suggestions_by_key.has(key):
760: 				var suggestion_variant: Variant = suggestions_by_key.get(key, {})
761: 				if suggestion_variant is Dictionary:
762: 					var suggestion: Dictionary = suggestion_variant
763: 					candidate["suggested_limit"] = float(suggestion.get("suggested_limit", 0.0))
764: 					candidate["current_limit"] = float(suggestion.get("current_limit", 0.0))
765: 					candidate["reason"] = str(suggestion.get("reason", ""))
766: 			reclaim_candidates.append(candidate)
767: 
768: 	whitelist_row["expire_idle_runs"] = expire_idle_runs
769: 	whitelist_row["auto_reclaim_hit_streak"] = auto_reclaim_hit_streak
770: 	whitelist_row["max_expired_entries"] = max_expired_entries
771: 	whitelist_row["max_reclaim_candidates"] = max_reclaim_candidates
772: 	whitelist_row["lifecycle"] = lifecycle
773: 	whitelist_row["expired_entries"] = expired_entries
774: 	whitelist_row["reclaim_candidates"] = reclaim_candidates
775: 	report["whitelist"] = whitelist_row
776: 
777: 	if expired_entries.size() > max_expired_entries:
778: 		_push_result(report, "global", "max_expired_entries_exceeded", false, "expired whitelist entries %d exceeds %d" % [expired_entries.size(), max_expired_entries])
779: 	if reclaim_candidates.size() > max_reclaim_candidates:
780: 		_push_result(report, "global", "max_reclaim_candidates_exceeded", false, "reclaim candidates %d exceeds %d" % [reclaim_candidates.size(), max_reclaim_candidates])
781: 
782: 
783: func _capture_snapshot(snapshot_id: String, row: Dictionary, sample_rounds: int) -> Dictionary:
784: 	var scene_path: String = str(row.get("scene", ""))
785: 	if scene_path.is_empty() or not scene_path.begins_with("res://"):
786: 		return {"ok": false, "message": "invalid scene path"}
787: 	if not ResourceLoader.exists(scene_path):
788: 		return {"ok": false, "message": "scene does not exist"}
789: 
790: 	var packed_scene: PackedScene = load(scene_path) as PackedScene
791: 	if packed_scene == null:
792: 		return {"ok": false, "message": "scene load failed"}
793: 
794: 	var instance: Node = packed_scene.instantiate()
795: 	if instance == null:
796: 		return {"ok": false, "message": "scene instantiate failed"}
797: 
798: 	var width: int = maxi(320, int(row.get("width", 1280)))
799: 	var height: int = maxi(180, int(row.get("height", 720)))
800: 	var warmup_frames: int = maxi(1, int(row.get("warmup_frames", 12)))
801: 	var capture_frames: int = maxi(1, int(row.get("capture_frames", 4)))
802: 	var setup: String = str(row.get("setup", "none"))
803: 
804: 	var viewport: SubViewport = SubViewport.new()
805: 	viewport.disable_3d = true
806: 	viewport.transparent_bg = false
807: 	viewport.render_target_update_mode = SubViewport.UPDATE_ALWAYS
808: 	viewport.render_target_clear_mode = SubViewport.CLEAR_MODE_ALWAYS
809: 	viewport.size = Vector2i(width, height)
810: 	get_root().add_child(viewport)
811: 	viewport.add_child(instance)
812: 
813: 	await _wait_frames(warmup_frames)
814: 	_apply_snapshot_setup(instance, setup)
815: 	await _wait_frames(capture_frames)
816: 	var output_path: String = "%s/%s.png" % [SNAPSHOT_DIR, _sanitize_snapshot_id(snapshot_id)]
817: 	var rounds: Array[Dictionary] = []
818: 	var rounds_count: int = maxi(1, sample_rounds)
819: 	for round_idx in range(rounds_count):
820: 		RenderingServer.force_draw()
821: 		await _wait_frames(1)
822: 		rounds.append(_capture_single_metrics(viewport, instance, width, height, output_path))
823: 
824: 	var metrics: Dictionary = _aggregate_round_metrics(rounds)
825: 	viewport.queue_free()
826: 	await _wait_frames(1)
827: 	return {
828: 		"ok": true,
829: 		"metrics": metrics,
830: 	}
831: 
832: 
833: func _capture_single_metrics(viewport: SubViewport, instance: Node, width: int, height: int, output_path: String) -> Dictionary:
834: 	if DisplayServer.get_name() == "headless":
835: 		var fallback_metrics_headless: Dictionary = _compute_fallback_scene_metrics(instance, width, height)
836: 		fallback_metrics_headless["image_path"] = ""
837: 		fallback_metrics_headless["capture_mode"] = "fallback_headless_display"
838: 		return fallback_metrics_headless
839: 
840: 	var texture: Texture2D = viewport.get_texture()
841: 	if texture == null:
842: 		var fallback_metrics: Dictionary = _compute_fallback_scene_metrics(instance, width, height)
843: 		fallback_metrics["image_path"] = ""
844: 		fallback_metrics["capture_mode"] = "fallback_headless"
845: 		return fallback_metrics
846: 
847: 	var image: Image = texture.get_image()
848: 	if image == null or image.is_empty():
849: 		var fallback_metrics_empty: Dictionary = _compute_fallback_scene_metrics(instance, width, height)
850: 		fallback_metrics_empty["image_path"] = ""
851: 		fallback_metrics_empty["capture_mode"] = "fallback_empty_image"
852: 		return fallback_metrics_empty
853: 
854: 	image.convert(Image.FORMAT_RGBA8)
855: 	var metrics: Dictionary = _compute_image_metrics(image)
856: 	var save_error: int = image.save_png(output_path)
857: 	if save_error != OK:
858: 		var fallback_metrics_save: Dictionary = _compute_fallback_scene_metrics(instance, width, height)
859: 		fallback_metrics_save["image_path"] = ""
860: 		fallback_metrics_save["capture_mode"] = "fallback_save_error"
861: 		return fallback_metrics_save
862: 
863: 	metrics["image_path"] = output_path
864: 	metrics["capture_mode"] = "image"
865: 	return metrics
866: 
867: 
868: func _aggregate_round_metrics(rounds: Array[Dictionary]) -> Dictionary:
869: 	var round_count: int = rounds.size()
870: 	if round_count <= 0:
871: 		return {}
872: 
873: 	var opaque_values: Array[float] = []
874: 	var luma_values: Array[float] = []
875: 	var color_values: Array[float] = []
876: 	var modes: Dictionary = {}
877: 	var sampled_pixels_sum: float = 0.0
878: 	var width: int = int(rounds[0].get("width", 0))
879: 	var height: int = int(rounds[0].get("height", 0))
880: 	var image_path: String = ""
881: 
882: 	for row in rounds:
883: 		var opaque_ratio: float = float(row.get("opaque_ratio", 0.0))
884: 		var avg_luma: float = float(row.get("avg_luma", 0.0))
885: 		var unique_colors: float = float(row.get("unique_colors", 0))
886: 		var sampled_pixels: float = float(row.get("sampled_pixels", 0))
887: 		opaque_values.append(opaque_ratio)
888: 		luma_values.append(avg_luma)
889: 		color_values.append(unique_colors)
890: 		sampled_pixels_sum += sampled_pixels
891: 
892: 		var mode: String = str(row.get("capture_mode", "unknown"))
893: 		modes[mode] = int(modes.get(mode, 0)) + 1
894: 
895: 		if image_path.is_empty():
896: 			var image_candidate: String = str(row.get("image_path", ""))
897: 			if not image_candidate.is_empty():
898: 				image_path = image_candidate
899: 
900: 	var opaque_avg: float = _avg(opaque_values)
901: 	var luma_avg: float = _avg(luma_values)
902: 	var unique_avg: float = _avg(color_values)
903: 	var opaque_stddev: float = _stddev(opaque_values, opaque_avg)
904: 	var luma_stddev: float = _stddev(luma_values, luma_avg)
905: 	var unique_stddev: float = _stddev(color_values, unique_avg)
906: 	var unique_stddev_ratio: float = unique_stddev / maxf(1.0, unique_avg)
907: 	var sampled_pixels_avg: int = int(round(sampled_pixels_sum / float(round_count)))
908: 	var opaque_pixels_avg: int = int(round(float(sampled_pixels_avg) * opaque_avg))
909: 
910: 	return {
911: 		"width": width,
912: 		"height": height,
913: 		"sample_rounds": round_count,
914: 		"sampled_pixels": sampled_pixels_avg,
915: 		"opaque_pixels": opaque_pixels_avg,
916: 		"opaque_ratio": opaque_avg,
917: 		"opaque_ratio_stddev": opaque_stddev,
918: 		"unique_colors": int(round(unique_avg)),
919: 		"unique_colors_stddev": unique_stddev,
920: 		"unique_color_stddev_ratio": unique_stddev_ratio,
921: 		"avg_luma": luma_avg,
922: 		"avg_luma_stddev": luma_stddev,
923: 		"capture_mode": _pick_dominant_mode(modes),
924: 		"capture_modes": modes,
925: 		"image_path": image_path,
926: 	}
927: 
928: 
929: func _avg(values: Array[float]) -> float:
930: 	if values.is_empty():
931: 		return 0.0
932: 	var total: float = 0.0
933: 	for v in values:
934: 		total += v
935: 	return total / float(values.size())
936: 
937: 
938: func _stddev(values: Array[float], mean: float) -> float:
939: 	if values.size() <= 1:
940: 		return 0.0
941: 	var sum_sq: float = 0.0
942: 	for v in values:
943: 		var delta: float = v - mean
944: 		sum_sq += delta * delta
945: 	return sqrt(sum_sq / float(values.size()))
946: 
947: 
948: func _pick_dominant_mode(modes: Dictionary) -> String:
949: 	var best_mode: String = "unknown"
950: 	var best_count: int = -1
951: 	for mode_var in modes.keys():
952: 		var mode: String = str(mode_var)
953: 		var count: int = int(modes.get(mode, 0))
954: 		if count > best_count:
955: 			best_mode = mode
956: 			best_count = count
957: 	return best_mode
958: 
959: 
960: func _detect_backend_tag() -> String:
961: 	var env_tag: String = OS.get_environment("VISUAL_SNAPSHOT_BACKEND_TAG").strip_edges()
962: 	if not env_tag.is_empty():
963: 		return env_tag
964: 	var os_name: String = OS.get_name().to_lower()
965: 	var display_name: String = DisplayServer.get_name().to_lower()
966: 	if display_name == "headless":
967: 		if os_name.contains("windows"):
968: 			return "windows_headless"
969: 		if os_name.contains("linux"):
970: 			return "linux_headless"
971: 		return "default"
972: 	return "default"
973: 
974: 
975: func _resolve_backend_profile(backend_profiles: Dictionary, backend_tag: String) -> Dictionary:
976: 	if backend_profiles.has(backend_tag):
977: 		var row: Variant = backend_profiles.get(backend_tag)
978: 		if row is Dictionary:
979: 			return row
980: 	if backend_profiles.has("default"):
981: 		var default_row: Variant = backend_profiles.get("default")
982: 		if default_row is Dictionary:
983: 			return default_row
984: 	return {}
985:

987: func _resolve_strategy_orchestration(strategy_raw: Variant, base_sections: Dictionary) -> Dictionary:
988: 	var resolved: Dictionary = {

1018: 		return resolved
1019: 	var strategies: Dictionary = strategies_variant

1022: 		errors_missing_strategy.append("strategy '%s' not found in strategy_orchestration.strategies" % selected_strategy)
1023: 		resolved["errors"] = errors_missing_strategy
1024: 		return resolved
1025: 
1026: 	var strategy_row_variant: Variant = strategies.get(selected_strategy, {})
1027: 	if not (strategy_row_variant is Dictionary):
1028: 		var errors_invalid_strategy: Array = resolved.get("errors", [])
1029: 		errors_invalid_strategy.append("strategy '%s' row must be object" % selected_strategy)
1030: 		resolved["errors"] = errors_invalid_strategy
1031: 		return resolved
1032: 	var strategy_row: Dictionary = strategy_row_variant
1033: 	var template_name: String = str(strategy_row.get("template", "")).strip_edges()
1034: 	if template_name.is_empty():
1035: 		var errors_missing_template: Array = resolved.get("errors", [])
1036: 		errors_missing_template.append("strategy '%s' missing template" % selected_strategy)
1037: 		resolved["errors"] = errors_missing_template
1038: 		return resolved
1039: 	resolved["template"] = template_name
1040: 
1041: 	var templates_variant: Variant = strategy_orchestration.get("templates", {})
1042: 	if not (templates_variant is Dictionary):
1043: 		var errors_missing_templates: Array = resolved.get("errors", [])
1044: 		errors_missing_templates.append("strategy_orchestration.templates must be object")
1045: 		resolved["errors"] = errors_missing_templates
1046: 		return resolved
1047: 	var templates: Dictionary = templates_variant
1048: 	if not templates.has(template_name):
1049: 		var errors_unknown_template: Array = resolved.get("errors", [])
1050: 		errors_unknown_template.append("template '%s' not found in strategy_orchestration.templates" % template_name)
1051: 		resolved["errors"] = errors_unknown_template
1052: 		return resolved
1053: 
1054: 	var template_row_variant: Variant = templates.get(template_name, {})
1055: 	if not (template_row_variant is Dictionary):
1056: 		var errors_invalid_template: Array = resolved.get("errors", [])
1057: 		errors_invalid_template.append("template '%s' row must be object" % template_name)
1058: 		resolved["errors"] = errors_invalid_template
1059: 		return resolved
1060: 	var template_row: Dictionary = template_row_variant
1061: 
1062: 	resolved["thresholds"] = _merge_shallow_dictionary(resolved.get("thresholds", {}), template_row.get("thresholds", {}))

1313:

1324:

1346: 		run_mode_templates["release_blocking"] = "blocking"

1349: 	for mode_name in required_run_modes:
1350: 		if not run_mode_templates.has(mode_name):

1352: 	output["run_mode_templates"] = run_mode_templates
