```
1357: func _resolve_approval_threshold_template(raw: Dictionary, run_mode: String, base_sections: Dictionary) -> Dictionary:
1358: 	var resolved: Dictionary = {
1359: 		"template": "standard",
1360: 		"errors": [],
1361: 		"approval_workflow": base_sections.get("approval_workflow", {}),
1362: 		"approval_audit_trail": base_sections.get("approval_audit_trail", {}),
1363: 		"approval_history_archive": base_sections.get("approval_history_archive", {}),
1364: 	}
1365: 	if raw.is_empty():
1366: 		return resolved
1367: 
1368: 	var default_template: String = str(raw.get("default_template", "standard")).strip_edges()
1369: 	if default_template.is_empty():
1370: 		default_template = "standard"
1371: 	var run_mode_templates: Dictionary = raw.get("run_mode_templates", {})
1372: 	var templates: Dictionary = raw.get("templates", {})
1373: 
1374: 	var selected_template: String = OS.get_environment("VISUAL_APPROVAL_TEMPLATE").strip_edges()
1375: 	if selected_template.is_empty() and run_mode_templates.has(run_mode):
1376: 		selected_template = str(run_mode_templates.get(run_mode, "")).strip_edges()
1377: 	if selected_template.is_empty():
1378: 		selected_template = default_template
1379: 	if selected_template.is_empty():
1380: 		selected_template = "standard"
1381: 	resolved["template"] = selected_template
1382: 
1383: 	if not templates.has(selected_template):
1384: 		var errors_missing_template: Array = resolved.get("errors", [])
1385: 		errors_missing_template.append("approval_threshold_templates template '%s' not found" % selected_template)
1386: 		resolved["errors"] = errors_missing_template
1387: 		return resolved
1388: 
1389: 	var template_row_variant: Variant = templates.get(selected_template, {})
1390: 	if not (template_row_variant is Dictionary):
1391: 		var errors_invalid_template: Array = resolved.get("errors", [])
1392: 		errors_invalid_template.append("approval_threshold_templates template '%s' must be object" % selected_template)
1393: 		resolved["errors"] = errors_invalid_template
1394: 		return resolved
1395: 
1396: 	var template_row: Dictionary = template_row_variant
1397: 	resolved["approval_workflow"] = _merge_shallow_dictionary(
1398: 		resolved.get("approval_workflow", {}),
1399: 		template_row.get("approval_workflow", {})
1400: 	)
1401: 	resolved["approval_audit_trail"] = _merge_shallow_dictionary(
1402: 		resolved.get("approval_audit_trail", {}),
1403: 		template_row.get("approval_audit_trail", {})
1404: 	)
1405: 	resolved["approval_history_archive"] = _merge_shallow_dictionary(
1406: 		resolved.get("approval_history_archive", {}),
1407: 		template_row.get("approval_history_archive", {})
1408: 	)
1409: 
1410: 	return resolved
1411: 
1412: 
1413: func _sanitize_release_candidate_tracking(raw: Variant) -> Dictionary:
1414: 	var output: Dictionary = {
1415: 		"history_file": "user://visual_snapshot_approval_archive.json",
1416: 		"window": 40,
1417: 		"required_run_modes": ["release_candidate"],
1418: 		"required_strategies": ["release_candidate"],
1419: 		"min_runs": 1,
1420: 		"max_avg_warnings": 1.0,
1421: 		"max_total_blockers": 0,
1422: 		"max_tracking_failures": 0,
1423: 	}
1424: 	if not (raw is Dictionary):
1425: 		return output
1426: 	var row: Dictionary = raw
1427: 	var history_file: String = str(row.get("history_file", output.get("history_file", "user://visual_snapshot_approval_archive.json"))).strip_edges()
1428: 	if history_file.begins_with("user://"):
1429: 		output["history_file"] = history_file
1430: 	output["window"] = maxi(5, int(row.get("window", output.get("window", 40))))
1431: 	var required_run_modes: Array[String] = _sanitize_string_array(row.get("required_run_modes", []))
1432: 	if not required_run_modes.is_empty():
1433: 		output["required_run_modes"] = required_run_modes
1434: 	var required_strategies: Array[String] = _sanitize_string_array(row.get("required_strategies", []))
1435: 	if not required_strategies.is_empty():
1436: 		output["required_strategies"] = required_strategies
1437: 	output["min_runs"] = maxi(1, int(row.get("min_runs", output.get("min_runs", 1))))
1438: 	output["max_avg_warnings"] = maxf(0.0, float(row.get("max_avg_warnings", output.get("max_avg_warnings", 1.0))))
1439: 	output["max_total_blockers"] = maxi(0, int(row.get("max_total_blockers", output.get("max_total_blockers", 0))))
1440: 	output["max_tracking_failures"] = maxi(0, int(row.get("max_tracking_failures", output.get("max_tracking_failures", 0))))
1441: 	return output
1442: 
1443: 
1444: func _sanitize_release_gate_templates(raw: Variant, strategy_raw: Variant) -> Dictionary:
1445: 	var output: Dictionary = {
1446: 		"required_strategies": [],
1447: 		"required_strategy_bindings": {},
1448: 		"ci_mode_bindings": {},
1449: 		"required_reports": [],
1450: 		"required_strategies_for_publish": [],
1451: 		"require_zero_warnings_for": [],
1452: 		"max_checklist_failures": 0,
1453: 	}
1454: 	if not (raw is Dictionary):
1455: 		return output
1456: 
1457: 	var row: Dictionary = raw
1458: 	output["required_strategies"] = _sanitize_string_array(row.get("required_strategies", []))
1459: 
1460: 	var strategy_bindings: Dictionary = {}
1461: 	var strategy_bindings_raw: Variant = row.get("required_strategy_bindings", {})
1462: 	if strategy_bindings_raw is Dictionary:
1463: 		for strategy_var in strategy_bindings_raw.keys():
1464: 			var strategy_name: String = str(strategy_var).strip_edges()
1465: 			var template_name: String = str(strategy_bindings_raw.get(strategy_var, "")).strip_edges()
1466: 			if strategy_name.is_empty() or template_name.is_empty():
1467: 				continue
1468: 			strategy_bindings[strategy_name] = template_name
1469: 	output["required_strategy_bindings"] = strategy_bindings
1470: 
1471: 	var ci_mode_bindings: Dictionary = {}
1472: 	var ci_mode_bindings_raw: Variant = row.get("ci_mode_bindings", {})
1473: 	if ci_mode_bindings_raw is Dictionary:
1474: 		for mode_var in ci_mode_bindings_raw.keys():
1475: 			var mode_name: String = str(mode_var).strip_edges()
1476: 			var strategy_name: String = str(ci_mode_bindings_raw.get(mode_var, "")).strip_edges()
1477: 			if mode_name.is_empty() or strategy_name.is_empty():
1478: 				continue
1479: 			ci_mode_bindings[mode_name] = strategy_name
1480: 	output["ci_mode_bindings"] = ci_mode_bindings
1481: 
1482: 	var release_checklist_raw: Variant = row.get("release_checklist", {})
1483: 	if release_checklist_raw is Dictionary:
1484: 		var release_checklist: Dictionary = release_checklist_raw
1485: 		output["required_reports"] = _sanitize_string_array(release_checklist.get("required_reports", []))
1486: 		output["required_strategies_for_publish"] = _sanitize_string_array(release_checklist.get("required_strategies_for_publish", []))
1487: 		output["require_zero_warnings_for"] = _sanitize_string_array(release_checklist.get("require_zero_warnings_for", []))
1488: 		output["max_checklist_failures"] = maxi(0, int(release_checklist.get("max_checklist_failures", 0)))
1489: 
1490: 	var strategy_row: Dictionary = strategy_raw if strategy_raw is Dictionary else {}
1491: 	var required_strategy_rows: Array[String] = output.get("required_strategies", [])
1492: 	if required_strategy_rows.is_empty():
1493: 		var strategies_raw: Variant = strategy_row.get("strategies", {})
1494: 		if strategies_raw is Dictionary:
1495: 			output["required_strategies"] = _sanitize_string_array((strategies_raw as Dictionary).keys())
1496: 
1497: 	return output
1498: 
1499: 
1500: func _sanitize_report_layers(raw: Variant, snapshots_raw: Variant) -> Dictionary:
1501: 	var output: Dictionary = {}
1502: 	if not (raw is Dictionary):
1503: 		return output
1504: 	var snapshots: Dictionary = snapshots_raw if snapshots_raw is Dictionary else {}
1505: 	for layer_var in raw.keys():
1506: 		var layer_name: String = str(layer_var).strip_edges()
1507: 		if layer_name.is_empty():
1508: 			continue
1509: 		var row: Variant = raw.get(layer_var, {})
1510: 		if not (row is Dictionary):
1511: 			continue
1512: 		var snapshot_ids: Array[String] = []
1513: 		for snapshot_var in row.get("snapshot_ids", []):
1514: 			var snapshot_id: String = str(snapshot_var).strip_edges()
1515: 			if snapshot_id.is_empty():
1516: 				continue
1517: 			if not snapshots.has(snapshot_id):
1518: 				continue
1519: 			snapshot_ids.append(snapshot_id)
1520: 		if snapshot_ids.is_empty():
1521: 			continue
1522: 		output[layer_name] = {
1523: 			"snapshot_ids": snapshot_ids,
1524: 			"max_layer_blockers": maxi(0, int(row.get("max_layer_blockers", 0))),
1525: 			"max_layer_warnings": maxi(0, int(row.get("max_layer_warnings", 0))),
1526: 			"min_pass_ratio": clampf(float(row.get("min_pass_ratio", 0.0)), 0.0, 1.0),
1527: 		}
1528: 	return output
1529: 
1530: 
1531: func _evaluate_release_gate_templates(
1532: 	report: Dictionary,
1533: 	release_manifest: Dictionary,
1534: 	strategy_orchestration_raw: Variant,
1535: 	strategy_name: String,
1536: 	strategy_template: String,
1537: 	run_mode: String
1538: ) -> void:
1539: 	if release_manifest.is_empty():
1540: 		return
1541: 
1542: 	var manifest_row: Dictionary = report.get("release_manifest", {})
1543: 	var errors: Array = []
1544: 	var checklist_items: Array = []
1545: 	var checklist_failures: int = 0
1546: 
1547: 	var required_strategies: Array[String] = _sanitize_string_array(release_manifest.get("required_strategies", []))
1548: 	var required_strategy_bindings: Dictionary = release_manifest.get("required_strategy_bindings", {})
1549: 	var ci_mode_bindings: Dictionary = release_manifest.get("ci_mode_bindings", {})
1550: 	var required_reports: Array[String] = _sanitize_string_array(release_manifest.get("required_reports", []))
1551: 	var required_strategies_for_publish: Array[String] = _sanitize_string_array(release_manifest.get("required_strategies_for_publish", []))
1552: 	var require_zero_warnings_for: Array[String] = _sanitize_string_array(release_manifest.get("require_zero_warnings_for", []))
1553: 	var max_checklist_failures: int = maxi(0, int(release_manifest.get("max_checklist_failures", 0)))
1554: 
1555: 	var strategy_orchestration: Dictionary = strategy_orchestration_raw if strategy_orchestration_raw is Dictionary else {}
1556: 	var strategies: Dictionary = strategy_orchestration.get("strategies", {})
1557: 
1558: 	for required_strategy in required_strategies:
1559: 		if not strategies.has(required_strategy):
1560: 			errors.append("required strategy '%s' not found in strategy_orchestration.strategies" % required_strategy)
1561: 
1562: 	for strategy_key_var in required_strategy_bindings.keys():
1563: 		var strategy_key: String = str(strategy_key_var).strip_edges()
1564: 		var expected_template: String = str(required_strategy_bindings.get(strategy_key_var, "")).strip_edges()
1565: 		if strategy_key.is_empty() or expected_template.is_empty():
1566: 			continue
1567: 		var strategy_row_variant: Variant = strategies.get(strategy_key, {})
1568: 		if not (strategy_row_variant is Dictionary):
1569: 			errors.append("required strategy binding '%s' has no strategy row" % strategy_key)
1570: 			continue
1571: 		var strategy_row: Dictionary = strategy_row_variant
1572: 		var actual_template: String = str(strategy_row.get("template", "")).strip_edges()
1573: 		if actual_template != expected_template:
1574: 			errors.append("required strategy binding '%s' expects template '%s' but got '%s'" % [strategy_key, expected_template, actual_template])
1575: 
1576: 	if not ci_mode_bindings.is_empty() and ci_mode_bindings.has(run_mode):
1577: 		var expected_strategy: String = str(ci_mode_bindings.get(run_mode, "")).strip_edges()
1578: 		if not expected_strategy.is_empty() and strategy_name != expected_strategy:
1579: 			errors.append("run_mode '%s' expects strategy '%s' but got '%s'" % [run_mode, expected_strategy, strategy_name])
1580: 
1581: 	for report_path in required_reports:
1582: 		var exists: bool = FileAccess.file_exists(report_path)
1583: 		var item: Dictionary = {
1584: 			"type": "required_report",
1585: 			"path": report_path,
1586: 			"ok": exists,
1587: 		}
1588: 		checklist_items.append(item)
1589: 		if not exists:
1590: 			checklist_failures += 1
1591: 
1592: 	for publish_strategy in required_strategies_for_publish:
1593: 		var exists: bool = strategies.has(publish_strategy)
1594: 		var item: Dictionary = {
1595: 			"type": "required_publish_strategy",
1596: 			"strategy": publish_strategy,
1597: 			"ok": exists,
1598: 		}
1599: 		checklist_items.append(item)
1600: 		if not exists:
1601: 			checklist_failures += 1
1602: 
1603: 	if require_zero_warnings_for.has(strategy_name):
1604: 		var warnings: int = int(report.get("warnings", 0))
1605: 		var warnings_ok: bool = warnings == 0
1606: 		checklist_items.append({
1607: 			"type": "strategy_zero_warnings",
1608: 			"strategy": strategy_name,
1609: 			"warnings": warnings,
1610: 			"ok": warnings_ok,
1611: 		})
1612: 		if not warnings_ok:
1613: 			checklist_failures += 1
1614: 
1615: 	for err in errors:
1616: 		_push_result(report, "global", "release_manifest_invalid", false, str(err))
1617: 
1618: 	if checklist_failures > max_checklist_failures:
1619: 		_push_result(
1620: 			report,
1621: 			"global",
1622: 			"release_manifest_checklist_failures_exceeded",
1623: 			false,
1624: 			"release manifest checklist failures %d exceeds %d" % [checklist_failures, max_checklist_failures]
1625: 		)
1626: 
1627: 	manifest_row["run_mode"] = run_mode
1628: 	manifest_row["strategy"] = strategy_name
1629: 	manifest_row["template"] = strategy_template
1630: 	manifest_row["required_strategies"] = required_strategies
1631: 	manifest_row["required_strategy_bindings"] = required_strategy_bindings
1632: 	manifest_row["ci_mode_bindings"] = ci_mode_bindings
1633: 	manifest_row["max_checklist_failures"] = max_checklist_failures
1634: 	manifest_row["checklist_failures"] = checklist_failures
1635: 	manifest_row["errors"] = errors
1636: 	manifest_row["checklist_items"] = checklist_items
1637: 	report["release_manifest"] = manifest_row
1638: 
1639: 
1640: func _evaluate_backend_matrix_governance(
1641: 	report: Dictionary,
1642: 	backend_matrix_governance: Dictionary,
1643: 	release_gate_templates: Dictionary,
1644: 	run_mode: String
1645: ) -> void:
1646: 	if backend_matrix_governance.is_empty():
1647: 		return
1648: 
1649: 	var backend_row: Dictionary = report.get("backend_matrix", {})
1650: 	var required_backend_matrix: Array[String] = _sanitize_string_array(backend_matrix_governance.get("required_backend_matrix", []))
1651: 	var declared_backend_matrix: Array[String] = _sanitize_string_array(backend_row.get("declared_backend_matrix", []))
1652: 	var required_run_modes: Array[String] = _sanitize_string_array(backend_matrix_governance.get("required_run_modes", []))
1653: 	var max_missing_backend_matrix: int = maxi(0, int(backend_matrix_governance.get("max_missing_backend_matrix", 0)))
1654: 	var max_missing_run_mode_bindings: int = maxi(0, int(backend_matrix_governance.get("max_missing_run_mode_bindings", 0)))
1655: 	var ci_mode_bindings: Dictionary = release_gate_templates.get("ci_mode_bindings", {})
1656: 
1657: 	var missing_backend_matrix: Array = []
1658: 	for backend_name in required_backend_matrix:
1659: 		if not declared_backend_matrix.has(backend_name):
1660: 			missing_backend_matrix.append(backend_name)
1661: 
1662: 	var missing_run_mode_bindings: Array = []
1663: 	for mode_name in required_run_modes:
1664: 		if not ci_mode_bindings.has(mode_name):
1665: 			missing_run_mode_bindings.append(mode_name)
1666: 
1667: 	backend_row["required_backend_matrix"] = required_backend_matrix
1668: 	backend_row["declared_backend_matrix"] = declared_backend_matrix
1669: 	backend_row["required_run_modes"] = required_run_modes
1670: 	backend_row["missing_backend_matrix"] = missing_backend_matrix
1671: 	backend_row["missing_run_mode_bindings"] = missing_run_mode_bindings
1672: 	backend_row["max_missing_backend_matrix"] = max_missing_backend_matrix
1673: 	backend_row["max_missing_run_mode_bindings"] = max_missing_run_mode_bindings
1674: 	backend_row["run_mode"] = run_mode
1675: 	report["backend_matrix"] = backend_row
1676: 
1677: 	if missing_backend_matrix.size() > max_missing_backend_matrix:
1678: 		_push_result(
1679: 			report,
1680: 			"global",
1681: 			"backend_matrix_missing_backends_exceeded",
1682: 			false,
1683: 			"missing backend matrix entries %d exceeds %d" % [missing_backend_matrix.size(), max_missing_backend_matrix]
1684: 		)
1685: 
1686: 	if missing_run_mode_bindings.size() > max_missing_run_mode_bindings:
1687: 		_push_result(
1688: 			report,
1689: 			"global",
1690: 			"backend_matrix_missing_run_modes_exceeded",
1691: 			false,
1692: 			"missing run_mode bindings %d exceeds %d" % [missing_run_mode_bindings.size(), max_missing_run_mode_bindings]
1693: 		)
1694: 
1695: 
1696: func _evaluate_approval_workflow(report: Dictionary, approval_workflow: Dictionary, strategy_name: String) -> void:
1697: 	if approval_workflow.is_empty():
1698: 		return
1699: 
1700: 	var approval_row: Dictionary = report.get("approval", {})
1701: 	var required_sections: Array[String] = _sanitize_string_array(approval_workflow.get("required_report_sections", []))
1702: 	var require_zero_blockers: bool = bool(approval_workflow.get("require_zero_blockers", true))
1703: 	var require_zero_warnings_for: Array[String] = _sanitize_string_array(approval_workflow.get("require_zero_warnings_for_strategies", []))
1704: 	var max_approval_failures: int = maxi(0, int(approval_workflow.get("max_approval_failures", 0)))
1705: 
1706: 	var checklist_items: Array = []
1707: 	var approval_failures: int = 0
1708: 
1709: 	for section_name in required_sections:
1710: 		var section_ok: bool = false
1711: 		match section_name:
1712: 			"Snapshots":
1713: 				var snapshots_variant: Variant = report.get("snapshots", {})
1714: 				section_ok = snapshots_variant is Dictionary and not (snapshots_variant as Dictionary).is_empty()
1715: 			"Trend":
1716: 				section_ok = report.has("trend")
1717: 			"Whitelist":
1718: 				section_ok = report.has("whitelist")
1719: 			"Backend Attribution":
1720: 				section_ok = report.has("backend_attribution")
1721: 			"Release Manifest":
1722: 				section_ok = report.has("release_manifest")
1723: 			"Backend Matrix Governance":
1724: 				section_ok = report.has("backend_matrix")
1725: 			"Approval Workflow":
1726: 				section_ok = true
1727: 			"Approval Audit Trail":
1728: 				section_ok = report.has("approval_audit")
1729: 			"Approval History Archive":
1730: 				section_ok = report.has("approval_archive")
1731: 			"Approval Template":
1732: 				section_ok = report.has("approval_template")
1733: 			"Release Candidate Tracking":
1734: 				section_ok = report.has("release_candidate_tracking")
1735: 			"Release Candidate Score":
1736: 				section_ok = report.has("release_candidate_score")
1737: 			"Approval Convergence Dashboard":
1738: 				section_ok = report.has("approval_dashboard")
1739: 			_:
1740: 				section_ok = false
1741: 
1742: 		checklist_items.append({
1743: 			"type": "required_report_section",
1744: 			"section": section_name,
1745: 			"ok": section_ok,
1746: 		})
1747: 		if not section_ok:
1748: 			approval_failures += 1
1749: 
1750: 	if require_zero_blockers:
1751: 		var blockers_ok: bool = int(report.get("blockers", 0)) == 0
1752: 		checklist_items.append({
1753: 			"type": "zero_blockers",
1754: 			"ok": blockers_ok,
1755: 			"blockers": int(report.get("blockers", 0)),
1756: 		})
1757: 		if not blockers_ok:
1758: 			approval_failures += 1
1759: 
1760: 	if require_zero_warnings_for.has(strategy_name):
1761: 		var warnings_ok: bool = int(report.get("warnings", 0)) == 0
1762: 		checklist_items.append({
1763: 			"type": "strategy_zero_warnings",
1764: 			"strategy": strategy_name,
1765: 			"warnings": int(report.get("warnings", 0)),
1766: 			"ok": warnings_ok,
1767: 		})
1768: 		if not warnings_ok:
1769: 			approval_failures += 1
1770: 
1771: 	approval_row["required_report_sections"] = required_sections
1772: 	approval_row["require_zero_blockers"] = require_zero_blockers
1773: 	approval_row["require_zero_warnings_for_strategies"] = require_zero_warnings_for
1774: 	approval_row["max_approval_failures"] = max_approval_failures
1775: 	approval_row["approval_failures"] = approval_failures
1776: 	approval_row["checklist_items"] = checklist_items
1777: 	report["approval"] = approval_row
1778: 
1779: 	if approval_failures > max_approval_failures:
1780: 		_push_result(
1781: 			report,
1782: 			"global",
1783: 			"approval_workflow_failures_exceeded",
1784: 			false,
1785: 			"approval failures %d exceeds %d" % [approval_failures, max_approval_failures]
1786: 		)
1787: 
1788: 
1789: func _evaluate_approval_audit_trail(
1790: 	report: Dictionary,
1791: 	audit_cfg: Dictionary,
1792: 	strategy_name: String,
1793: 	run_mode: String,
1794: 	backend_tag: String
1795: ) -> void:
1796: 	if audit_cfg.is_empty():
1797: 		return
1798: 
1799: 	var history_file: String = str(audit_cfg.get("history_file", "user://visual_snapshot_approval_history.json"))
1800: 	var max_entries: int = maxi(10, int(audit_cfg.get("max_entries", 80)))
1801: 	var required_run_modes: Array[String] = _sanitize_string_array(audit_cfg.get("required_run_modes", []))
1802: 	var required_backends: Array[String] = _sanitize_string_array(audit_cfg.get("required_backends", []))
1803: 	var require_unique_pipeline_id: bool = bool(audit_cfg.get("require_unique_pipeline_id", true))
1804: 	var max_missing_pipeline_id: int = maxi(0, int(audit_cfg.get("max_missing_pipeline_id", 0)))
1805: 	var max_history_trace_failures: int = maxi(0, int(audit_cfg.get("max_history_trace_failures", 0)))
1806: 
1807: 	var pipeline_id: String = OS.get_environment("VISUAL_PIPELINE_ID").strip_edges()
1808: 	if pipeline_id.is_empty():
1809: 		pipeline_id = OS.get_environment("GITHUB_RUN_ID").strip_edges()
1810: 	if pipeline_id.is_empty():
1811: 		pipeline_id = OS.get_environment("CI_PIPELINE_ID").strip_edges()
1812: 
1813: 	var history: Array = []
1814: 	if FileAccess.file_exists(history_file):
1815: 		var parsed: Variant = JSON.parse_string(FileAccess.get_file_as_string(history_file))
1816: 		if parsed is Array:
1817: 			history = parsed
1818: 
1819: 	var current_record: Dictionary = {
1820: 		"timestamp": int(report.get("generated_at_unix", Time.get_unix_time_from_system())),
1821: 		"channel": str(report.get("channel", "unknown")),
1822: 		"backend_tag": backend_tag,
1823: 		"run_mode": run_mode,
1824: 		"strategy": strategy_name,
1825: 		"pipeline_id": pipeline_id,
1826: 		"blockers": int(report.get("blockers", 0)),
1827: 		"warnings": int(report.get("warnings", 0)),
1828: 		"approval_failures": int((report.get("approval", {}) as Dictionary).get("approval_failures", 0)),
1829: 	}
1830: 	history.append(current_record)
1831: 	if history.size() > max_entries:
1832: 		history = history.slice(history.size() - max_entries, history.size())
1833: 
1834: 	var history_file_access: FileAccess = FileAccess.open(history_file, FileAccess.WRITE)
1835: 	if history_file_access:
1836: 		history_file_access.store_string(JSON.stringify(history, "\t"))
1837: 
1838: 	var seen_run_modes: Dictionary = {}
1839: 	var seen_backends: Dictionary = {}
1840: 	var pipeline_key_counts: Dictionary = {}
1841: 	var missing_pipeline_id_count: int = 0
1842: 	for entry in history:
1843: 		if not (entry is Dictionary):
1844: 			continue
1845: 		var row: Dictionary = entry
1846: 		var mode_name: String = str(row.get("run_mode", "")).strip_edges()
1847: 		if not mode_name.is_empty():
1848: 			seen_run_modes[mode_name] = true
1849: 		var backend_name: String = str(row.get("backend_tag", "")).strip_edges()
1850: 		if not backend_name.is_empty():
1851: 			seen_backends[backend_name] = true
1852: 		var row_pipeline_id: String = str(row.get("pipeline_id", "")).strip_edges()
1853: 		if row_pipeline_id.is_empty():
1854: 			missing_pipeline_id_count += 1
1855: 		var pipeline_key: String = "%s|%s|%s" % [row_pipeline_id, mode_name, backend_name]
1856: 		pipeline_key_counts[pipeline_key] = int(pipeline_key_counts.get(pipeline_key, 0)) + 1
1857: 
1858: 	var missing_run_modes: Array = []
1859: 	for mode_name in required_run_modes:
1860: 		if not seen_run_modes.has(mode_name):
1861: 			missing_run_modes.append(mode_name)
1862: 
1863: 	var backend_matrix_row: Dictionary = report.get("backend_matrix", {})
1864: 	var declared_backend_matrix: Array[String] = _sanitize_string_array(backend_matrix_row.get("declared_backend_matrix", []))
1865: 	var missing_backends: Array = []
1866: 	for backend_name in required_backends:
1867: 		if not declared_backend_matrix.has(backend_name):
1868: 			missing_backends.append(backend_name)
1869: 
1870: 	var duplicate_pipeline_ids: Array = []
1871: 	if require_unique_pipeline_id:
1872: 		for key_var in pipeline_key_counts.keys():
1873: 			var key: String = str(key_var)
1874: 			if key.begins_with("|"):
1875: 				continue
1876: 			if int(pipeline_key_counts.get(key, 0)) > 1:
1877: 				duplicate_pipeline_ids.append(key)
1878: 
1879: 	var trace_failures: int = 0
1880: 	var items: Array = []
1881: 
1882: 	items.append({
1883: 		"type": "missing_run_modes",
1884: 		"value": missing_run_modes,
1885: 		"ok": missing_run_modes.is_empty(),
1886: 	})
1887: 	if not missing_run_modes.is_empty():
1888: 		trace_failures += 1
1889: 
1890: 	items.append({
1891: 		"type": "missing_backends",
1892: 		"value": missing_backends,
1893: 		"ok": missing_backends.is_empty(),
1894: 	})
1895: 	if not missing_backends.is_empty():
1896: 		trace_failures += 1
1897: 
1898: 	items.append({
1899: 		"type": "missing_pipeline_id_count",
1900: 		"value": missing_pipeline_id_count,
1901: 		"limit": max_missing_pipeline_id,
1902: 		"ok": missing_pipeline_id_count <= max_missing_pipeline_id,
1903: 	})
1904: 	if missing_pipeline_id_count > max_missing_pipeline_id:
1905: 		trace_failures += 1
1906: 
1907: 	if require_unique_pipeline_id:
1908: 		items.append({
1909: 			"type": "duplicate_pipeline_ids",
1910: 			"value": duplicate_pipeline_ids,
1911: 			"ok": duplicate_pipeline_ids.is_empty(),
1912: 		})
1913: 		if not duplicate_pipeline_ids.is_empty():
1914: 			trace_failures += 1
1915: 
1916: 	var audit_row: Dictionary = report.get("approval_audit", {})
1917: 	audit_row["history_file"] = history_file
1918: 	audit_row["max_entries"] = max_entries
1919: 	audit_row["required_run_modes"] = required_run_modes
1920: 	audit_row["required_backends"] = required_backends
1921: 	audit_row["declared_backend_matrix"] = declared_backend_matrix
1922: 	audit_row["seen_backends"] = seen_backends.keys()
1923: 	audit_row["require_unique_pipeline_id"] = require_unique_pipeline_id
1924: 	audit_row["max_missing_pipeline_id"] = max_missing_pipeline_id
1925: 	audit_row["max_history_trace_failures"] = max_history_trace_failures
1926: 	audit_row["pipeline_id"] = pipeline_id
1927: 	audit_row["history_entries"] = history.size()
1928: 	audit_row["missing_run_modes"] = missing_run_modes
1929: 	audit_row["missing_backends"] = missing_backends
1930: 	audit_row["duplicate_pipeline_ids"] = duplicate_pipeline_ids
1931: 	audit_row["missing_pipeline_id_count"] = missing_pipeline_id_count
1932: 	audit_row["trace_failures"] = trace_failures
1933: 	audit_row["items"] = items
1934: 	report["approval_audit"] = audit_row
1935: 
1936: 	if trace_failures > max_history_trace_failures:
1937: 		var message: String = "approval audit trace failures %d exceeds %d" % [trace_failures, max_history_trace_failures]
1938: 		if run_mode == "release_blocking":
1939: 			_push_result(
1940: 				report,
1941: 				"global",
1942: 				"approval_audit_trace_failures_exceeded",
1943: 				false,
1944: 				message
1945: 			)
1946: 		else:
1947: 			_push_warning(
1948: 				report,
1949: 				"global",
1950: 				"approval_audit_trace_failures_pending",
1951: 				message
1952: 			)
1953: 
1954: 
1955: func _evaluate_approval_history_archive(
1956: 	report: Dictionary,
1957: 	archive_cfg: Dictionary,
1958: 	strategy_name: String,
1959: 	run_mode: String,
1960: 	backend_tag: String
1961: ) -> void:
1962: 	if archive_cfg.is_empty():
1963: 		return
1964: 
1965: 	var archive_file: String = str(archive_cfg.get("archive_file", "user://visual_snapshot_approval_archive.json"))
1966: 	var max_entries: int = maxi(20, int(archive_cfg.get("max_entries", 240)))
1967: 	var aggregation_window: int = maxi(10, int(archive_cfg.get("aggregation_window", 80)))
1968: 	var required_backends: Array[String] = _sanitize_string_array(archive_cfg.get("required_backends", []))
1969: 	var required_run_modes: Array[String] = _sanitize_string_array(archive_cfg.get("required_run_modes", []))
1970: 	var max_missing_archive_backends: int = maxi(0, int(archive_cfg.get("max_missing_archive_backends", 0)))
1971: 	var max_missing_archive_run_modes: int = maxi(0, int(archive_cfg.get("max_missing_archive_run_modes", 0)))
1972: 	var max_backend_warning_delta: int = maxi(0, int(archive_cfg.get("max_backend_warning_delta", 0)))
1973: 	var max_backend_blocker_delta: int = maxi(0, int(archive_cfg.get("max_backend_blocker_delta", 0)))
1974: 	var max_archive_trace_failures: int = maxi(0, int(archive_cfg.get("max_archive_trace_failures", 0)))
1975: 
1976: 	var pipeline_id: String = OS.get_environment("VISUAL_PIPELINE_ID").strip_edges()
1977: 	if pipeline_id.is_empty():
1978: 		pipeline_id = OS.get_environment("GITHUB_RUN_ID").strip_edges()
1979: 	if pipeline_id.is_empty():
1980: 		pipeline_id = OS.get_environment("CI_PIPELINE_ID").strip_edges()
1981: 
1982: 	var archive_history: Array = []
1983: 	if FileAccess.file_exists(archive_file):
1984: 		var parsed: Variant = JSON.parse_string(FileAccess.get_file_as_string(archive_file))
1985: 		if parsed is Array:
1986: 			archive_history = parsed
1987: 
1988: 	var approval_row: Dictionary = report.get("approval", {})
1989: 	var current_record: Dictionary = {
1990: 		"timestamp": int(report.get("generated_at_unix", Time.get_unix_time_from_system())),
1991: 		"channel": str(report.get("channel", "unknown")),
1992: 		"backend_tag": backend_tag,
1993: 		"run_mode": run_mode,
1994: 		"strategy": strategy_name,
1995: 		"pipeline_id": pipeline_id,
1996: 		"blockers": int(report.get("blockers", 0)),
1997: 		"warnings": int(report.get("warnings", 0)),
1998: 		"approval_failures": int(approval_row.get("approval_failures", 0)),
1999: 	}
2000: 	archive_history.append(current_record)
2001: 	if archive_history.size() > max_entries:
2002: 		archive_history = archive_history.slice(archive_history.size() - max_entries, archive_history.size())
2003: 
2004: 	var archive_file_access: FileAccess = FileAccess.open(archive_file, FileAccess.WRITE)
2005: 	if archive_file_access:
2006: 		archive_file_access.store_string(JSON.stringify(archive_history, "\t"))
2007: 
2008: 	var start_index: int = maxi(0, archive_history.size() - aggregation_window)
2009: 	var window_history: Array = archive_history.slice(start_index, archive_history.size())
2010: 
2011: 	var seen_run_modes: Dictionary = {}
2012: 	var seen_backends: Dictionary = {}
2013: 	var backend_stats: Dictionary = {}
2014: 	for entry in window_history:
2015: 		if not (entry is Dictionary):
2016: 			continue
2017: 		var row: Dictionary = entry
2018: 		var mode_name: String = str(row.get("run_mode", "")).strip_edges()
2019: 		var backend_name: String = str(row.get("backend_tag", "")).strip_edges()
2020: 		if not mode_name.is_empty():
2021: 			seen_run_modes[mode_name] = true
2022: 		if not backend_name.is_empty():
2023: 			seen_backends[backend_name] = true
2024: 			var stat_row: Dictionary = backend_stats.get(backend_name, {
2025: 				"runs": 0,
2026: 				"warnings": 0,
2027: 				"blockers": 0,
2028: 			})
2029: 			stat_row["runs"] = int(stat_row.get("runs", 0)) + 1
2030: 			stat_row["warnings"] = int(stat_row.get("warnings", 0)) + int(row.get("warnings", 0))
2031: 			stat_row["blockers"] = int(stat_row.get("blockers", 0)) + int(row.get("blockers", 0))
2032: 			backend_stats[backend_name] = stat_row
2033: 
2034: 	var declared_backend_matrix: Array[String] = _sanitize_string_array((report.get("backend_matrix", {}) as Dictionary).get("declared_backend_matrix", []))
2035: 	var missing_backends: Array = []
2036: 	for backend_name in required_backends:
2037: 		if not declared_backend_matrix.has(backend_name):
2038: 			missing_backends.append(backend_name)
2039: 
2040: 	var missing_run_modes: Array = []
2041: 	for mode_name in required_run_modes:
2042: 		if not seen_run_modes.has(mode_name):
2043: 			missing_run_modes.append(mode_name)
2044: 
2045: 	var warning_values: Array[float] = []
2046: 	var blocker_values: Array[float] = []
2047: 	for backend_name in required_backends:
2048: 		if not backend_stats.has(backend_name):
2049: 			continue
2050: 		var row: Dictionary = backend_stats.get(backend_name, {})
2051: 		warning_values.append(float(row.get("warnings", 0)))
2052: 		blocker_values.append(float(row.get("blockers", 0)))
2053: 
2054: 	var backend_warning_delta: int = 0
2055: 	if warning_values.size() >= 2:
2056: 		backend_warning_delta = int(round(warning_values.max() - warning_values.min()))
2057: 	var backend_blocker_delta: int = 0
2058: 	if blocker_values.size() >= 2:
2059: 		backend_blocker_delta = int(round(blocker_values.max() - blocker_values.min()))
2060: 
2061: 	var trace_failures: int = 0
2062: 	var items: Array = []
2063: 
2064: 	items.append({
2065: 		"type": "missing_archive_backends",
2066: 		"value": missing_backends,
2067: 		"limit": max_missing_archive_backends,
2068: 		"ok": missing_backends.size() <= max_missing_archive_backends,
2069: 	})
2070: 	if missing_backends.size() > max_missing_archive_backends:
2071: 		trace_failures += 1
2072: 
2073: 	items.append({
2074: 		"type": "missing_archive_run_modes",
2075: 		"value": missing_run_modes,
2076: 		"limit": max_missing_archive_run_modes,
2077: 		"ok": missing_run_modes.size() <= max_missing_archive_run_modes,
2078: 	})
2079: 	if missing_run_modes.size() > max_missing_archive_run_modes:
2080: 		trace_failures += 1
2081: 
2082: 	items.append({
2083: 		"type": "backend_warning_delta",
2084: 		"value": backend_warning_delta,
2085: 		"limit": max_backend_warning_delta,
2086: 		"ok": backend_warning_delta <= max_backend_warning_delta,
2087: 	})
2088: 	if backend_warning_delta > max_backend_warning_delta:
2089: 		trace_failures += 1
2090: 
2091: 	items.append({
2092: 		"type": "backend_blocker_delta",
2093: 		"value": backend_blocker_delta,
2094: 		"limit": max_backend_blocker_delta,
2095: 		"ok": backend_blocker_delta <= max_backend_blocker_delta,
2096: 	})
2097: 	if backend_blocker_delta > max_backend_blocker_delta:
2098: 		trace_failures += 1
2099: 
2100: 	var archive_row: Dictionary = report.get("approval_archive", {})
2101: 	archive_row["archive_file"] = archive_file
2102: 	archive_row["max_entries"] = max_entries
2103: 	archive_row["aggregation_window"] = aggregation_window
2104: 	archive_row["required_backends"] = required_backends
2105: 	archive_row["required_run_modes"] = required_run_modes
2106: 	archive_row["max_missing_archive_backends"] = max_missing_archive_backends
2107: 	archive_row["max_missing_archive_run_modes"] = max_missing_archive_run_modes
2108: 	archive_row["max_backend_warning_delta"] = max_backend_warning_delta
2109: 	archive_row["max_backend_blocker_delta"] = max_backend_blocker_delta
2110: 	archive_row["max_archive_trace_failures"] = max_archive_trace_failures
2111: 	archive_row["history_entries"] = archive_history.size()
2112: 	archive_row["window_entries"] = window_history.size()
2113: 	archive_row["missing_backends"] = missing_backends
2114: 	archive_row["missing_run_modes"] = missing_run_modes
2115: 	archive_row["backend_warning_delta"] = backend_warning_delta
2116: 	archive_row["backend_blocker_delta"] = backend_blocker_delta
2117: 	archive_row["trace_failures"] = trace_failures
2118: 	archive_row["backend_stats"] = backend_stats
2119: 	archive_row["items"] = items
2120: 	report["approval_archive"] = archive_row
2121: 
2122: 	if trace_failures > max_archive_trace_failures:
2123: 		var message: String = "approval archive trace failures %d exceeds %d" % [trace_failures, max_archive_trace_failures]
2124: 		if run_mode == "release_blocking":
2125: 			_push_result(report, "global", "approval_archive_trace_failures_exceeded", false, message)
2126: 		else:
2127: 			_push_warning(report, "global", "approval_archive_trace_failures_pending", message)
2128: 
2129: 
2130: func _evaluate_release_candidate_tracking(report: Dictionary, tracking_cfg: Dictionary, run_mode: String) -> void:
2131: 	if tracking_cfg.is_empty():
2132: 		return
2133: 
2134: 	var history_file: String = str(tracking_cfg.get("history_file", "user://visual_snapshot_approval_archive.json"))
2135: 	var window: int = maxi(5, int(tracking_cfg.get("window", 40)))
2136: 	var required_run_modes: Array[String] = _sanitize_string_array(tracking_cfg.get("required_run_modes", []))
2137: 	var required_strategies: Array[String] = _sanitize_string_array(tracking_cfg.get("required_strategies", []))
2138: 	var min_runs: int = maxi(1, int(tracking_cfg.get("min_runs", 1)))
2139: 	var max_avg_warnings: float = maxf(0.0, float(tracking_cfg.get("max_avg_warnings", 1.0)))
2140: 	var max_total_blockers: int = maxi(0, int(tracking_cfg.get("max_total_blockers", 0)))
2141: 	var max_tracking_failures: int = maxi(0, int(tracking_cfg.get("max_tracking_failures", 0)))
2142: 
2143: 	var archive_history: Array = []
2144: 	if FileAccess.file_exists(history_file):
2145: 		var parsed: Variant = JSON.parse_string(FileAccess.get_file_as_string(history_file))
2146: 		if parsed is Array:
2147: 			archive_history = parsed
2148: 
2149: 	var start_index: int = maxi(0, archive_history.size() - window)
2150: 	var window_history: Array = archive_history.slice(start_index, archive_history.size())
2151: 
2152: 	var matching_runs: int = 0
2153: 	var warning_sum: float = 0.0
2154: 	var blocker_sum: int = 0
2155: 	var seen_run_modes: Dictionary = {}
2156: 	var seen_strategies: Dictionary = {}
2157: 	for entry in window_history:
2158: 		if not (entry is Dictionary):
2159: 			continue
2160: 		var row: Dictionary = entry
2161: 		var mode_name: String = str(row.get("run_mode", "")).strip_edges()
2162: 		var strategy_name: String = str(row.get("strategy", "")).strip_edges()
2163: 		var mode_ok: bool = required_run_modes.is_empty() or required_run_modes.has(mode_name)
2164: 		var strategy_ok: bool = required_strategies.is_empty() or required_strategies.has(strategy_name)
2165: 		if mode_ok and strategy_ok:
2166: 			matching_runs += 1
2167: 			warning_sum += float(row.get("warnings", 0))
2168: 			blocker_sum += int(row.get("blockers", 0))
2169: 		if mode_ok and not mode_name.is_empty():
2170: 			seen_run_modes[mode_name] = true
2171: 		if strategy_ok and not strategy_name.is_empty():
2172: 			seen_strategies[strategy_name] = true
2173: 
2174: 	var avg_warnings: float = 0.0
2175: 	if matching_runs > 0:
2176: 		avg_warnings = warning_sum / float(matching_runs)
2177: 
2178: 	var tracking_items: Array = []
2179: 	var tracking_failures: int = 0
2180: 
2181: 	tracking_items.append({
2182: 		"type": "min_runs",
2183: 		"value": matching_runs,
2184: 		"limit": min_runs,
2185: 		"ok": matching_runs >= min_runs,
2186: 	})
2187: 	if matching_runs < min_runs:
2188: 		tracking_failures += 1
2189: 
2190: 	tracking_items.append({
2191: 		"type": "max_avg_warnings",
2192: 		"value": avg_warnings,
2193: 		"limit": max_avg_warnings,
2194: 		"ok": avg_warnings <= max_avg_warnings,
2195: 	})
2196: 	if avg_warnings > max_avg_warnings:
2197: 		tracking_failures += 1
2198: 
2199: 	tracking_items.append({
2200: 		"type": "max_total_blockers",
2201: 		"value": blocker_sum,
2202: 		"limit": max_total_blockers,
2203: 		"ok": blocker_sum <= max_total_blockers,
2204: 	})
2205: 	if blocker_sum > max_total_blockers:
2206: 		tracking_failures += 1
2207: 
2208: 	var missing_run_modes: Array = []
2209: 	for mode_name in required_run_modes:
2210: 		if not seen_run_modes.has(mode_name):
2211: 			missing_run_modes.append(mode_name)
2212: 	tracking_items.append({
2213: 		"type": "missing_run_modes",
2214: 		"value": missing_run_modes,
2215: 		"ok": missing_run_modes.is_empty(),
2216: 	})
2217: 	if not missing_run_modes.is_empty():
2218: 		tracking_failures += 1
2219: 
2220: 	var missing_strategies: Array = []
2221: 	for strategy_name in required_strategies:
2222: 		if not seen_strategies.has(strategy_name):
2223: 			missing_strategies.append(strategy_name)
2224: 	tracking_items.append({
2225: 		"type": "missing_strategies",
2226: 		"value": missing_strategies,
2227: 		"ok": missing_strategies.is_empty(),
2228: 	})
2229: 	if not missing_strategies.is_empty():
2230: 		tracking_failures += 1
2231: 
2232: 	var tracking_row: Dictionary = report.get("release_candidate_tracking", {})
2233: 	tracking_row["history_file"] = history_file
```

```
2473: func _apply_game_world_chapter_setup(instance: Node, chapter_id: String) -> void:
2474: 	if not instance.has_method("_get_chapter_id_for_room"):
2475: 		return
2476: 
2477: 	var room_index: int = _find_chapter_room_index(instance, chapter_id)

2482: 	if instance.has_method("_apply_room_theme"):

2490: 	if instance.has_method("_render_hazard_tiles"):
2491: 		instance.call("_render_hazard_tiles")

2499: func _find_chapter_room_index(instance: Node, chapter_id: String) -> int:
2500: 	var fallback: Dictionary = {
2501: 		"chapter_1": 1,
2502: 		"chapter_2": 4,
2503: 		"chapter_3": 7,
2504: 		"chapter_4": 10,
2505: 	}
2506: 	var run_plan_variant: Variant = instance.get("_run_plan")
2507: 	if run_plan_variant is Dictionary:
2508: 		var run_plan: Dictionary = run_plan_variant
2509: 		var rooms_variant: Variant = run_plan.get("rooms", [])
2510: 		if rooms_variant is Array:
2511: 			var rooms: Array = rooms_variant
2512: 			for room_variant in rooms:
2513: 				if room_variant is Dictionary:
2514: 					var room_row: Dictionary = room_variant
2515: 					if str(room_row.get("chapter_id", "")) == chapter_id:
2516: 						return maxi(1, int(room_row.get("index", 1)))
2517: 	return int(fallback.get(chapter_id, 1))
2518: 
2519: 
2520: func _compute_image_metrics(image: Image) -> Dictionary:
2521: 	var width: int = image.get_width()
2522: 	var height: int = image.get_height()
2523: 	var sample_step: int = 2
2524: 	var sampled_pixels: int = 0
2525: 	var opaque_pixels: int = 0
2526: 	var luma_sum: float = 0.0
2527: 	var color_buckets: Dictionary = {}
2528: 
2529: 	for y in range(0, height, sample_step):
2530: 		for x in range(0, width, sample_step):
2531: 			var color: Color = image.get_pixel(x, y)
2532: 			sampled_pixels += 1
2533: 			var rgba: int = int(color.to_rgba32())
2534: 			var quantized: int = rgba & 0xF0F0F0F0
2535: 			color_buckets[quantized] = true
2536: 			if color.a > 0.05:
2537: 				opaque_pixels += 1
2538: 				luma_sum += (color.r + color.g + color.b) / 3.0
2539: 
2540: 	var opaque_ratio: float = 0.0
2541: 	if sampled_pixels > 0:
2542: 		opaque_ratio = float(opaque_pixels) / float(sampled_pixels)
2543: 
2544: 	var avg_luma: float = 0.0
2545: 	if opaque_pixels > 0:
2546: 		avg_luma = luma_sum / float(opaque_pixels)
2547: 
2548: 	return {
2549: 		"width": width,
2550: 		"height": height,
2551: 		"sampled_pixels": sampled_pixels,
2552: 		"opaque_pixels": opaque_pixels,
2553: 		"opaque_ratio": opaque_ratio,
2554: 		"unique_colors": color_buckets.size(),
2555: 		"avg_luma": avg_luma,
2556: 	}
2557: 
2558: 
2559: func _compute_fallback_scene_metrics(instance: Node, width: int, height: int) -> Dictionary:
2560: 	var total_canvas: int = 0
2561: 	var visible_canvas: int = 0
2562: 	var tilemap_count: int = 0
2563: 	var luma_sum: float = 0.0
2564: 	var color_buckets: Dictionary = {}
2565: 
2566: 	var stack: Array[Node] = [instance]
2567: 	while not stack.is_empty():
2568: 		var node: Node = stack.pop_back()
2569: 		for child in node.get_children():
2570: 			if child is Node:
2571: 				stack.append(child)
2572: 
2573: 		if node is CanvasItem:
2574: 			total_canvas += 1
2575: 			var canvas: CanvasItem = node
2576: 			if canvas.visible:
2577: 				visible_canvas += 1
2578: 			var color: Color = canvas.modulate
2579: 			luma_sum += (color.r + color.g + color.b) / 3.0
2580: 			color_buckets[int(color.to_rgba32()) & 0xF0F0F0F0] = true
2581: 		if node is TileMap:
2582: 			tilemap_count += 1
2583: 
2584: 	var total_weight: int = max(1, total_canvas + tilemap_count * 6)
2585: 	var opaque_weight: int = visible_canvas + tilemap_count * 5
2586: 	var opaque_ratio: float = clampf(float(opaque_weight) / float(total_weight), 0.15, 0.95)
2587: 	var avg_luma: float = 0.5
2588: 	if total_canvas > 0:
2589: 		avg_luma = clampf(luma_sum / float(total_canvas), 0.05, 0.95)
2590: 	var unique_colors: int = maxi(12, color_buckets.size() * 4 + tilemap_count * 10 + int(float(total_canvas) * 0.5))
2591: 
2592: 	return {
2593: 		"width": width,
2594: 		"height": height,
2595: 		"sampled_pixels": width * height,
2596: 		"opaque_pixels": int(float(width * height) * opaque_ratio),
2597: 		"opaque_ratio": opaque_ratio,
2598: 		"unique_colors": unique_colors,
2599: 		"avg_luma": avg_luma,
2600: 		"fallback": true,
2601: 	}
2602: 
2603: 
2604: func _sanitize_snapshot_id(raw_id: String) -> String:
2605: 	var output: String = raw_id.strip_edges()
2606: 	if output.is_empty():
2607: 		return "snapshot"
2608: 	output = output.replace("/", "_")
2609: 	output = output.replace("\\", "_")
2610: 	output = output.replace(":", "_")
2611: 	output = output.replace(" ", "_")
2612: 	return output
2613: 
2614: 
2615: func _wait_frames(frame_count: int) -> void:
2616: 	for _i in range(frame_count):
2617: 		await process_frame
2618:

2620: func _read_json(path: String) -> Dictionary:
2621: 	if not FileAccess.file_exists(path):
2622: 		return {}
2623: 	var text: String = FileAccess.get_file_as_string(path)
2624: 	if text.is_empty():
2625: 		return {}
2626: 	var parsed: Variant = JSON.parse_string(text)
2627: 	if parsed is Dictionary:
2628: 		return parsed
2629: 	return {}

2633: 	if not FileAccess.file_exists(REPORT_JSON_PATH):
2634: 		return
2635: 	var latest: String = FileAccess.get_file_as_string(REPORT_JSON_PATH)
2636: 	if latest.is_empty():
2637: 		return
2638: 	var prev_file: FileAccess = FileAccess.open(PREV_REPORT_JSON_PATH, FileAccess.WRITE)
2639: 	if prev_file:
2640: 		prev_file.store_string(latest)

2643: func _push_warning(report: Dictionary, snapshot_id: String, rule_id: String, message: String) -> void:
2644: 	_push_result(report, snapshot_id, rule_id, false, message, "warning")
2645: 
2646: 
2647: func _push_result(
2648: 	report: Dictionary,
2649: 	snapshot_id: String,
2650: 	rule_id: String,
2651: 	passed: bool,
2652: 	message: String,
2653: 	severity: String = "blocker"
2654: ) -> void:
2655: 	var items: Array = report.get("items", [])
2656: 	items.append(
2657: 		{
2658: 			"snapshot": snapshot_id,
2659: 			"id": rule_id,
2660: 			"passed": passed,
2661: 			"severity": severity,
2662: 			"message": message,
2663: 		}
2664: 	)
2665: 	report["items"] = items
2666: 	report["checked"] = int(report.get("checked", 0)) + 1
2667: 	if passed:
2668: 		report["passed"] = int(report.get("passed", 0)) + 1
2669: 	elif severity == "warning":
2670: 		report["warnings"] = int(report.get("warnings", 0)) + 1
2671: 	else:
2672: 		report["blockers"] = int(report.get("blockers", 0)) + 1
2673: 
2674: 
2675: func _write_reports(report: Dictionary) -> void:
2676: 	var json_text: String = JSON.stringify(report, "\t")
2677: 	var json_file: FileAccess = FileAccess.open(REPORT_JSON_PATH, FileAccess.WRITE)
2678: 	if json_file:
2679: 		json_file.store_string(json_text)
2680: 
2681: 	var lines: Array[String] = []
2682: 	lines.append("# Visual Snapshot Regression Report")
2683: 	lines.append("")
2684: 	lines.append("- channel: %s" % str(report.get("channel", "unknown")))
2685: 	lines.append("- backend_tag: %s" % str(report.get("backend_tag", "default")))
2686: 	var strategy_row: Dictionary = report.get("strategy", {})
2687: 	var strategy_errors: Array = strategy_row.get("errors", [])
2688: 	lines.append("- strategy: %s (template=%s, errors=%d)" % [
2689: 		str(strategy_row.get("name", "default")),
2690: 		str(strategy_row.get("template", "base")),
2691: 		strategy_errors.size(),
2692: 	])
2693: 	lines.append("- checked: %d" % int(report.get("checked", 0)))
2694: 	lines.append("- passed: %d" % int(report.get("passed", 0)))
2695: 	lines.append("- blockers: %d" % int(report.get("blockers", 0)))
2696: 	lines.append("- warnings: %d" % int(report.get("warnings", 0)))
2697: 	var precision_row: Dictionary = report.get("precision", {})
2698: 	lines.append("- precision: rounds=%d, opaque_stddev<=%.4f, luma_stddev<=%.4f, unique_stddev_ratio<=%.4f" % [
2699: 		int(precision_row.get("sample_rounds", 1)),
2700: 		float(precision_row.get("max_opaque_ratio_stddev", 1.0)),
2701: 		float(precision_row.get("max_luma_stddev", 1.0)),
2702: 		float(precision_row.get("max_unique_color_stddev_ratio", 1.0)),
2703: 	])
2704: 	var whitelist_row: Dictionary = report.get("whitelist", {})
2705: 	lines.append("- whitelist: hits=%d/%d, ratio=%.3f/%.3f" % [
2706: 		int(whitelist_row.get("hits", 0)),
2707: 		int(whitelist_row.get("max_hits", 0)),
2708: 		float(whitelist_row.get("ratio", 0.0)),
2709: 		float(whitelist_row.get("max_ratio", 0.0)),
2710: 	])
2711: 	var attribution_row: Dictionary = report.get("backend_attribution", {})
2712: 	lines.append("- backend_attribution: backend=%s, regressions=%d, backend_specific=%d/%d, unattributed=%d/%d" % [
2713: 		str(attribution_row.get("backend_tag", "")),
2714: 		int(attribution_row.get("regressions", 0)),
2715: 		int(attribution_row.get("backend_specific_regressions", 0)),
2716: 		int(attribution_row.get("max_backend_specific_regressions", 0)),
2717: 		int(attribution_row.get("unattributed_regressions", 0)),
2718: 		int(attribution_row.get("max_unattributed_regressions", 0)),
2719: 	])
2720: 	var convergence_items_summary: Array = whitelist_row.get("convergence_suggestions", [])
2721: 	lines.append("- whitelist_convergence: suggestions=%d (stale_run_threshold=%d, tighten_margin_ratio=%.2f)" % [
2722: 		convergence_items_summary.size(),
2723: 		int(whitelist_row.get("stale_run_threshold", 0)),
2724: 		float(whitelist_row.get("tighten_margin_ratio", 0.0)),
2725: 	])
2726: 	var expired_entries_summary: Array = whitelist_row.get("expired_entries", [])
2727: 	var reclaim_candidates_summary: Array = whitelist_row.get("reclaim_candidates", [])
2728: 	lines.append("- exception_lifecycle: expired=%d/%d, reclaim_candidates=%d/%d" % [
2729: 		expired_entries_summary.size(),
2730: 		int(whitelist_row.get("max_expired_entries", 0)),
2731: 		reclaim_candidates_summary.size(),
2732: 		int(whitelist_row.get("max_reclaim_candidates", 0)),
2733: 	])
2734: 	var cross_row: Dictionary = report.get("cross_version", {})
2735: 	lines.append("- cross_version: checked=%d, violations=%d/%d" % [
2736: 		int(cross_row.get("checked", 0)),
2737: 		int(cross_row.get("violations", 0)),
2738: 		int(cross_row.get("max_violations", 0)),
2739: 	])
2740: 	var release_manifest_row: Dictionary = report.get("release_manifest", {})
2741: 	var release_manifest_errors: Array = release_manifest_row.get("errors", [])
2742: 	lines.append("- release_manifest: run_mode=%s, strategy=%s/%s, checklist_failures=%d/%d, errors=%d" % [
2743: 		str(release_manifest_row.get("run_mode", "rehearsal")),
2744: 		str(release_manifest_row.get("strategy", "default")),
2745: 		str(release_manifest_row.get("template", "base")),
2746: 		int(release_manifest_row.get("checklist_failures", 0)),
2747: 		int(release_manifest_row.get("max_checklist_failures", 0)),
2748: 		release_manifest_errors.size(),
2749: 	])
2750: 	var backend_matrix_row: Dictionary = report.get("backend_matrix", {})
2751: 	var missing_backend_matrix: Array = backend_matrix_row.get("missing_backend_matrix", [])
2752: 	var missing_run_mode_bindings: Array = backend_matrix_row.get("missing_run_mode_bindings", [])
2753: 	lines.append("- backend_matrix_governance: backend=%s, missing_backends=%d/%d, missing_run_modes=%d/%d" % [
2754: 		str(backend_matrix_row.get("backend_tag", "")),
2755: 		missing_backend_matrix.size(),
2756: 		int(backend_matrix_row.get("max_missing_backend_matrix", 0)),
2757: 		missing_run_mode_bindings.size(),
2758: 		int(backend_matrix_row.get("max_missing_run_mode_bindings", 0)),
2759: 	])
2760: 	var approval_row: Dictionary = report.get("approval", {})
2761: 	lines.append("- approval_workflow: failures=%d/%d, require_zero_blockers=%s" % [
2762: 		int(approval_row.get("approval_failures", 0)),
2763: 		int(approval_row.get("max_approval_failures", 0)),
2764: 		str(bool(approval_row.get("require_zero_blockers", true))),
2765: 	])
2766: 	var approval_audit_row: Dictionary = report.get("approval_audit", {})
2767: 	lines.append("- approval_audit: history_entries=%d, trace_failures=%d/%d, pipeline_id=%s" % [
2768: 		int(approval_audit_row.get("history_entries", 0)),
2769: 		int(approval_audit_row.get("trace_failures", 0)),
2770: 		int(approval_audit_row.get("max_history_trace_failures", 0)),
2771: 		str(approval_audit_row.get("pipeline_id", "")),
2772: 	])
2773: 	var approval_archive_row: Dictionary = report.get("approval_archive", {})
2774: 	lines.append("- approval_archive: history_entries=%d, window_entries=%d, trace_failures=%d/%d" % [
2775: 		int(approval_archive_row.get("history_entries", 0)),
2776: 		int(approval_archive_row.get("window_entries", 0)),
2777: 		int(approval_archive_row.get("trace_failures", 0)),
2778: 		int(approval_archive_row.get("max_archive_trace_failures", 0)),
2779: 	])
2780: 	var approval_template_row: Dictionary = report.get("approval_template", {})
2781: 	lines.append("- approval_template: run_mode=%s, template=%s, errors=%d" % [
2782: 		str(approval_template_row.get("run_mode", "rehearsal")),
2783: 		str(approval_template_row.get("template", "standard")),
2784: 		(approval_template_row.get("errors", []) as Array).size(),
2785: 	])
2786: 	var tracking_row: Dictionary = report.get("release_candidate_tracking", {})
2787: 	lines.append("- release_candidate_tracking: matching_runs=%d, avg_warnings=%.3f/%.3f, blockers=%d/%d, failures=%d/%d" % [
2788: 		int(tracking_row.get("matching_runs", 0)),
2789: 		float(tracking_row.get("avg_warnings", 0.0)),
2790: 		float(tracking_row.get("max_avg_warnings", 0.0)),
2791: 		int(tracking_row.get("total_blockers", 0)),
2792: 		int(tracking_row.get("max_total_blockers", 0)),
2793: 		int(tracking_row.get("tracking_failures", 0)),
2794: 		int(tracking_row.get("max_tracking_failures", 0)),
2795: 	])
2796: 	lines.append("")
2797: 	lines.append("## Snapshots")
2798: 	var snapshots: Dictionary = report.get("snapshots", {})
2799: 	for snapshot_id in snapshots.keys():
2800: 		var row: Dictionary = snapshots.get(snapshot_id, {})
2801: 		lines.append(
2802: 			"- %s: opaque_ratio=%.3f, unique_colors=%d, avg_luma=%.3f, mode=%s, stddev(o=%.4f,l=%.4f,u=%.4f), image=%s" % [
2803: 				str(snapshot_id),
2804: 				float(row.get("opaque_ratio", 0.0)),
2805: 				int(row.get("unique_colors", 0)),
2806: 				float(row.get("avg_luma", 0.0)),
2807: 				str(row.get("capture_mode", "unknown")),
2808: 				float(row.get("opaque_ratio_stddev", 0.0)),
2809: 				float(row.get("avg_luma_stddev", 0.0)),
2810: 				float(row.get("unique_color_stddev_ratio", 0.0)),
2811: 				str(row.get("image_path", "")),
2812: 			]
2813: 		)
2814: 
2815: 	lines.append("")
2816: 	lines.append("## Trend")
2817: 	var trend: Dictionary = report.get("trend", {})
2818: 	lines.append("- regressions: %d" % int(trend.get("regressions", 0)))
2819: 	var opaque_drops: Dictionary = trend.get("opaque_ratio_drops", {})
2820: 	for snapshot_id in opaque_drops.keys():
2821: 		lines.append("- opaque_drop %s: %.3f" % [str(snapshot_id), float(opaque_drops.get(snapshot_id, 0.0))])
2822: 	var color_drops: Dictionary = trend.get("unique_color_drop_ratios", {})
2823: 	for snapshot_id in color_drops.keys():
2824: 		lines.append("- unique_color_drop_ratio %s: %.3f" % [str(snapshot_id), float(color_drops.get(snapshot_id, 0.0))])
2825: 	var luma_deltas: Dictionary = trend.get("luma_deltas", {})
2826: 	for snapshot_id in luma_deltas.keys():
2827: 		lines.append("- luma_delta %s: %.3f" % [str(snapshot_id), float(luma_deltas.get(snapshot_id, 0.0))])
2828: 
2829: 	lines.append("")
2830: 	lines.append("## Whitelist")
2831: 	var whitelist_items: Array = whitelist_row.get("items", [])
2832: 	for item in whitelist_items:
2833: 		if item is Dictionary:
2834: 			var row: Dictionary = item
2835: 			lines.append("- %s / %s: actual=%.3f default=%.3f whitelist=%.3f reason=%s" % [
2836: 				str(row.get("snapshot", "")),
2837: 				str(row.get("id", "")),
2838: 				float(row.get("actual", 0.0)),
2839: 				float(row.get("default_limit", 0.0)),
2840: 				float(row.get("effective_limit", 0.0)),
2841: 				str(row.get("reason", "")),
2842: 			])
2843: 
2844: 	lines.append("")
2845: 	lines.append("## Whitelist Convergence")
2846: 	var convergence_items: Array = whitelist_row.get("convergence_suggestions", [])
2847: 	for item in convergence_items:
2848: 		if item is Dictionary:
2849: 			var row: Dictionary = item
2850: 			lines.append("- %s / %s: streak=%d actual=%.3f current_limit=%.3f -> suggested_limit=%.3f (default=%.3f, reason=%s)" % [
2851: 				str(row.get("snapshot", "")),
2852: 				str(row.get("id", "")),
2853: 				int(row.get("streak", 0)),
2854: 				float(row.get("actual", 0.0)),
2855: 				float(row.get("current_limit", 0.0)),
2856: 				float(row.get("suggested_limit", 0.0)),
2857: 				float(row.get("default_limit", 0.0)),
2858: 				str(row.get("reason", "")),
2859: 			])
2860: 
2861: 	lines.append("")
2862: 	lines.append("## Exception Lifecycle")
2863: 	var expired_entries: Array = whitelist_row.get("expired_entries", [])
2864: 	for item in expired_entries:
2865: 		if item is Dictionary:
2866: 			var row: Dictionary = item
2867: 			lines.append("- expired %s / %s: idle_runs=%d (threshold=%d)" % [
2868: 				str(row.get("snapshot", "")),
2869: 				str(row.get("id", "")),
2870: 				int(row.get("idle_runs", 0)),
2871: 				int(row.get("expire_idle_runs", 0)),
2872: 			])
2873: 	var reclaim_candidates: Array = whitelist_row.get("reclaim_candidates", [])
2874: 	for item in reclaim_candidates:
2875: 		if item is Dictionary:
2876: 			var row: Dictionary = item
2877: 			lines.append("- reclaim %s / %s: hit_streak=%d (threshold=%d), current_limit=%.3f, suggested_limit=%.3f, reason=%s" % [
2878: 				str(row.get("snapshot", "")),
2879: 				str(row.get("id", "")),
2880: 				int(row.get("hit_streak", 0)),
2881: 				int(row.get("auto_reclaim_hit_streak", 0)),
2882: 				float(row.get("current_limit", 0.0)),
2883: 				float(row.get("suggested_limit", 0.0)),
2884: 				str(row.get("reason", "")),
2885: 			])
2886: 
2887: 	lines.append("")
2888: 	lines.append("## Backend Attribution")
2889: 	var attribution_items: Array = attribution_row.get("items", [])
2890: 	for item in attribution_items:
2891: 		if item is Dictionary:
2892: 			var row: Dictionary = item
2893: 			lines.append("- %s / %s: mode=%s attribution=%s" % [
2894: 				str(row.get("snapshot", "")),
2895: 				str(row.get("id", "")),
2896: 				str(row.get("capture_mode", "unknown")),
2897: 				str(row.get("attribution", "unattributed")),
2898: 			])
2899: 
2900: 	lines.append("")
2901: 	lines.append("## Cross Version")
2902: 	var cross_items: Array = cross_row.get("items", [])
2903: 	for item in cross_items:
2904: 		if item is Dictionary:
2905: 			var row: Dictionary = item
2906: 			lines.append("- %s / %s (%s): current=%.3f baseline=%.3f drift=%.3f limit=%.3f" % [
2907: 				str(row.get("snapshot", "")),
2908: 				str(row.get("metric", "")),
2909: 				str(row.get("reference_channel", "")),
2910: 				float(row.get("current", 0.0)),
2911: 				float(row.get("baseline", 0.0)),
2912: 				float(row.get("drift", 0.0)),
2913: 				float(row.get("limit", 0.0)),
2914: 			])
2915: 
2916: 	lines.append("")
2917: 	lines.append("## Layers")
2918: 	var layers: Dictionary = report.get("layers", {})
2919: 	for layer_name in layers.keys():
2920: 		var row: Dictionary = layers.get(layer_name, {})
2921: 		lines.append("- %s: snapshots=%d, passed=%d, pass_ratio=%.3f/%.3f, blockers=%d/%d, warnings=%d/%d" % [
2922: 			str(layer_name),
2923: 			int(row.get("snapshots", 0)),
2924: 			int(row.get("passed", 0)),
2925: 			float(row.get("pass_ratio", 0.0)),
2926: 			float(row.get("min_pass_ratio", 0.0)),
2927: 			int(row.get("blockers", 0)),
2928: 			int(row.get("max_layer_blockers", 0)),
2929: 			int(row.get("warnings", 0)),
2930: 			int(row.get("max_layer_warnings", 0)),
2931: 		])
2932: 
2933: 	lines.append("")
2934: 	lines.append("## Release Manifest")
2935: 	var manifest_errors: Array = release_manifest_row.get("errors", [])
2936: 	for err in manifest_errors:
2937: 		lines.append("- error: %s" % str(err))
2938: 	var checklist_items: Array = release_manifest_row.get("checklist_items", [])
2939: 	for item in checklist_items:
2940: 		if item is Dictionary:
2941: 			var row: Dictionary = item
2942: 			var ok: bool = bool(row.get("ok", false))
2943: 			var status: String = "OK" if ok else "FAIL"
2944: 			var item_type: String = str(row.get("type", ""))
2945: 			if item_type == "required_report":
2946: 				lines.append("- [%s] report %s" % [status, str(row.get("path", ""))])
2947: 			elif item_type == "required_publish_strategy":
2948: 				lines.append("- [%s] publish_strategy %s" % [status, str(row.get("strategy", ""))])
2949: 			elif item_type == "strategy_zero_warnings":
2950: 				lines.append("- [%s] strategy_zero_warnings %s warnings=%d" % [status, str(row.get("strategy", "")), int(row.get("warnings", 0))])
2951: 
2952: 	lines.append("")
2953: 	lines.append("## Backend Matrix Governance")
2954: 	var declared_backend_matrix: Array = backend_matrix_row.get("declared_backend_matrix", [])
2955: 	var required_backend_matrix: Array = backend_matrix_row.get("required_backend_matrix", [])
2956: 	var required_run_modes: Array = backend_matrix_row.get("required_run_modes", [])
2957: 	lines.append("- declared_backend_matrix: %s" % ", ".join(_sanitize_string_array(declared_backend_matrix)))
2958: 	lines.append("- required_backend_matrix: %s" % ", ".join(_sanitize_string_array(required_backend_matrix)))
2959: 	lines.append("- required_run_modes: %s" % ", ".join(_sanitize_string_array(required_run_modes)))
2960: 	for backend_name in missing_backend_matrix:
2961: 		lines.append("- missing_backend: %s" % str(backend_name))
2962: 	for run_mode_name in missing_run_mode_bindings:
2963: 		lines.append("- missing_run_mode_binding: %s" % str(run_mode_name))
2964: 
2965: 	lines.append("")
2966: 	lines.append("## Approval Workflow")
2967: 	var approval_items: Array = approval_row.get("checklist_items", [])
2968: 	for item in approval_items:
2969: 		if item is Dictionary:
2970: 			var row: Dictionary = item
2971: 			var ok: bool = bool(row.get("ok", false))
2972: 			var status: String = "OK" if ok else "FAIL"
2973: 			var item_type: String = str(row.get("type", ""))
2974: 			if item_type == "required_report_section":
2975: 				lines.append("- [%s] section %s" % [status, str(row.get("section", ""))])
2976: 			elif item_type == "zero_blockers":
2977: 				lines.append("- [%s] zero_blockers blockers=%d" % [status, int(row.get("blockers", 0))])
2978: 			elif item_type == "strategy_zero_warnings":
2979: 				lines.append("- [%s] strategy_zero_warnings %s warnings=%d" % [status, str(row.get("strategy", "")), int(row.get("warnings", 0))])
2980: 
2981: 	lines.append("")
2982: 	lines.append("## Approval Audit Trail")
2983: 	lines.append("- history_file: %s" % str(approval_audit_row.get("history_file", "")))
2984: 	lines.append("- history_entries: %d" % int(approval_audit_row.get("history_entries", 0)))
2985: 	lines.append("- pipeline_id: %s" % str(approval_audit_row.get("pipeline_id", "")))
2986: 	lines.append("- missing_run_modes: %s" % ", ".join(_sanitize_string_array(approval_audit_row.get("missing_run_modes", []))))
2987: 	lines.append("- missing_backends: %s" % ", ".join(_sanitize_string_array(approval_audit_row.get("missing_backends", []))))
2988: 	lines.append("- trace_failures: %d/%d" % [
2989: 		int(approval_audit_row.get("trace_failures", 0)),
2990: 		int(approval_audit_row.get("max_history_trace_failures", 0)),
2991: 	])
2992: 	var approval_audit_items: Array = approval_audit_row.get("items", [])
2993: 	for item in approval_audit_items:
2994: 		if item is Dictionary:
2995: 			var row: Dictionary = item
2996: 			var ok: bool = bool(row.get("ok", false))
2997: 			var status: String = "OK" if ok else "FAIL"
2998: 			lines.append("- [%s] %s -> %s" % [status, str(row.get("type", "")), str(row.get("value", row.get("limit", "")))])
2999: 
3000: 	lines.append("")
3001: 	lines.append("## Approval History Archive")
3002: 	lines.append("- archive_file: %s" % str(approval_archive_row.get("archive_file", "")))
3003: 	lines.append("- history_entries: %d" % int(approval_archive_row.get("history_entries", 0)))
3004: 	lines.append("- window_entries: %d" % int(approval_archive_row.get("window_entries", 0)))
3005: 	lines.append("- missing_run_modes: %s" % ", ".join(_sanitize_string_array(approval_archive_row.get("missing_run_modes", []))))
3006: 	lines.append("- missing_backends: %s" % ", ".join(_sanitize_string_array(approval_archive_row.get("missing_backends", []))))
3007: 	lines.append("- backend_warning_delta: %d/%d" % [
3008: 		int(approval_archive_row.get("backend_warning_delta", 0)),
3009: 		int(approval_archive_row.get("max_backend_warning_delta", 0)),
3010: 	])
3011: 	lines.append("- backend_blocker_delta: %d/%d" % [
3012: 		int(approval_archive_row.get("backend_blocker_delta", 0)),
3013: 		int(approval_archive_row.get("max_backend_blocker_delta", 0)),
3014: 	])
3015: 	lines.append("- trace_failures: %d/%d" % [
3016: 		int(approval_archive_row.get("trace_failures", 0)),
3017: 		int(approval_archive_row.get("max_archive_trace_failures", 0)),
3018: 	])
3019: 	var approval_archive_items: Array = approval_archive_row.get("items", [])
3020: 	for item in approval_archive_items:
3021: 		if item is Dictionary:
3022: 			var row: Dictionary = item
3023: 			var ok: bool = bool(row.get("ok", false))
3024: 			var status: String = "OK" if ok else "FAIL"
3025: 			lines.append("- [%s] %s -> %s" % [status, str(row.get("type", "")), str(row.get("value", row.get("limit", "")))])
3026: 
3027: 	lines.append("")
3028: 	lines.append("## Release Candidate Tracking")
3029: 	lines.append("- history_file: %s" % str(tracking_row.get("history_file", "")))
3030: 	lines.append("- matching_runs: %d" % int(tracking_row.get("matching_runs", 0)))
3031: 	lines.append("- avg_warnings: %.3f / %.3f" % [
3032: 		float(tracking_row.get("avg_warnings", 0.0)),
3033: 		float(tracking_row.get("max_avg_warnings", 0.0)),
3034: 	])
3035: 	lines.append("- total_blockers: %d / %d" % [
3036: 		int(tracking_row.get("total_blockers", 0)),
3037: 		int(tracking_row.get("max_total_blockers", 0)),
3038: 	])
3039: 	lines.append("- tracking_failures: %d / %d" % [
3040: 		int(tracking_row.get("tracking_failures", 0)),
3041: 		int(tracking_row.get("max_tracking_failures", 0)),
3042: 	])
3043: 	var tracking_items: Array = tracking_row.get("items", [])
3044: 	for item in tracking_items:
3045: 		if item is Dictionary:
3046: 			var row: Dictionary = item
3047: 			var ok: bool = bool(row.get("ok", false))
3048: 			var status: String = "OK" if ok else "FAIL"
3049: 			lines.append("- [%s] %s -> %s" % [status, str(row.get("type", "")), str(row.get("value", row.get("limit", "")))])
3050: 
3051: 	lines.append("")
3052: 	lines.append("## Items")
3053: 	var items: Array = report.get("items", [])
3054: 	for item in items:
3055: 		if item is Dictionary:
3056: 			var row: Dictionary = item
3057: 			var status: String = "PASS"
3058: 			if not bool(row.get("passed", false)):
3059: 				status = "WARN" if str(row.get("severity", "blocker")) == "warning" else "FAIL"
3060: 			lines.append("- [%s] %s / %s -> %s" % [status, str(row.get("snapshot", "")), str(row.get("id", "")), str(row.get("message", ""))])
3061: 
3062: 	var markdown_file: FileAccess = FileAccess.open(REPORT_MD_PATH, FileAccess.WRITE)
3063: 	if markdown_file:
3064: 		markdown_file.store_string("\n".join(lines) + "\n")

(End of file - total 3064 lines)
</content>
```
