27: 
28: def _is_number(value: Any) -> bool:
29:     return isinstance(value, (int, float)) and not isinstance(value, bool)
30: 
31: 
32: def _to_float(value: Any) -> float | None:
33:     if _is_number(value):
34:         return float(value)
35:     return None
36: 
37: 
38: def _is_hex_color(value: Any) -> bool:
39:     if not isinstance(value, str):
40:         return False
41:     if len(value) not in (7, 9):
42:         return False
43:     if not value.startswith("#"):
44:         return False
45:     try:
46:         int(value[1:], 16)
47:         return True
48:     except ValueError:
49:         return False
50: 
51: 
52: def _add_error(errors: list[str], message: str) -> None:
53:     errors.append(message)
54: 
55: 
56: def _validate_required_files(parsed: dict[str, Any], errors: list[str]) -> None:
57:     existing = set(parsed.keys())
58:     missing = sorted(REQUIRED_FILES - existing)
59:     if missing:
60:         _add_error(errors, f"Missing required config files: {', '.join(missing)}")
61: 
62: 
63: def _validate_xp_curve(data: dict[str, Any], errors: list[str]) -> None:
64:     for key in ("base_xp", "curve_exponent", "max_level", "levels"):
65:         if key not in data:
66:             _add_error(errors, f"xp_curve.json missing key '{key}'")
67:             return
68: 
69:     if not _is_number(data["base_xp"]) or data["base_xp"] <= 0:
70:         _add_error(errors, "xp_curve.json base_xp must be > 0")
71:     if not _is_number(data["curve_exponent"]) or data["curve_exponent"] <= 1.0:
72:         _add_error(errors, "xp_curve.json curve_exponent should be > 1.0")
73:     if not isinstance(data["max_level"], int) or data["max_level"] < 5:
74:         _add_error(errors, "xp_curve.json max_level must be integer >= 5")
75: 
76:     levels = data.get("levels")
77:     if not isinstance(levels, dict) or not levels:
78:         _add_error(errors, "xp_curve.json levels must be a non-empty object")
79:         return
80: 
81:     for key, value in levels.items():
82:         if not str(key).isdigit():
83:             _add_error(errors, f"xp_curve.json invalid level key '{key}'")
84:         if not isinstance(value, int) or value <= 0:
85:             _add_error(errors, f"xp_curve.json level '{key}' xp must be positive int")
86: 
87: 
88: def _validate_characters(data: dict[str, Any], errors: list[str]) -> None:
89:     default_id = data.get("default_character_id")
90:     rows = data.get("characters")
91:     if not isinstance(default_id, str) or not default_id:
92:         _add_error(errors, "characters.json default_character_id must be non-empty string")
93:     if not isinstance(rows, list) or not rows:
94:         _add_error(errors, "characters.json characters must be non-empty array")
95:         return
96: 
97:     seen: set[str] = set()
98:     valid_ids: set[str] = set()
99:     unlock_type_by_id: dict[str, str] = {}
100:     for i, row in enumerate(rows):
101:         if not isinstance(row, dict):
102:             _add_error(errors, f"characters.json characters[{i}] must be object")
103:             continue
104: 
105:         char_id = row.get("id")
106:         if not isinstance(char_id, str) or not char_id:
107:             _add_error(errors, f"characters.json characters[{i}].id invalid")
108:             continue
109:         if char_id in seen:
110:             _add_error(errors, f"characters.json duplicate id '{char_id}'")
111:         seen.add(char_id)
112:         valid_ids.add(char_id)
113: 
114:         if not isinstance(row.get("name"), str) or not row.get("name"):
115:             _add_error(errors, f"characters.json {char_id}.name invalid")
116:         if not isinstance(row.get("description"), str) or not row.get("description"):
117:             _add_error(errors, f"characters.json {char_id}.description invalid")
118: 
119:         unlock_type = row.get("unlock_type", "default")
120:         unlock_value = row.get("unlock_value", "")
121:         unlock_desc = row.get("unlock_desc", "")
122:         allowed_unlock_types = {"default", "achievement", "ending", "meta_runs"}
123:         if not isinstance(unlock_type, str) or unlock_type not in allowed_unlock_types:
124:             _add_error(errors, f"characters.json {char_id}.unlock_type invalid")
125:             unlock_type = "default"
126:         unlock_type_by_id[char_id] = unlock_type
127: 
128:         if not isinstance(unlock_desc, str):
129:             _add_error(errors, f"characters.json {char_id}.unlock_desc must be string")
130: 
131:         if unlock_type != "default":
132:             if not isinstance(unlock_value, str) or not unlock_value:
133:                 _add_error(errors, f"characters.json {char_id}.unlock_value required for unlock_type '{unlock_type}'")
134:             elif unlock_type == "meta_runs" and not unlock_value.isdigit():
135:                 _add_error(errors, f"characters.json {char_id}.unlock_value for meta_runs must be integer string")
136: 
137:         if not isinstance(row.get("trait_id"), str) or not row.get("trait_id"):
138:             _add_error(errors, f"characters.json {char_id}.trait_id invalid")
139:         if not isinstance(row.get("trait_name"), str) or not row.get("trait_name"):
140:             _add_error(errors, f"characters.json {char_id}.trait_name invalid")
141:         if not isinstance(row.get("trait_desc"), str) or not row.get("trait_desc"):
142:             _add_error(errors, f"characters.json {char_id}.trait_desc invalid")
143: 
144:         weapon_profile = row.get("weapon_profile")
145:         if not isinstance(weapon_profile, dict):
146:             _add_error(errors, f"characters.json {char_id}.weapon_profile must be object")
147:         else:
148:             mode = weapon_profile.get("mode", "single")
149:             projectile_count = _to_float(weapon_profile.get("projectile_count"))
150:             spread_angle_deg = _to_float(weapon_profile.get("spread_angle_deg"))
151:             spread_jitter_deg = _to_float(weapon_profile.get("spread_jitter_deg", 0.0))
152:             projectile_hits = _to_float(weapon_profile.get("projectile_hits"))
153:             projectile_style = weapon_profile.get("projectile_style", "default")
154: 
155:             if not isinstance(mode, str) or mode not in {"single", "spread"}:
156:                 _add_error(errors, f"characters.json {char_id}.weapon_profile.mode must be 'single' or 'spread'")
157:             if projectile_count is None or projectile_count < 1 or projectile_count > 7:
158:                 _add_error(errors, f"characters.json {char_id}.weapon_profile.projectile_count must be within [1, 7]")
159:             if spread_angle_deg is None or spread_angle_deg < 0 or spread_angle_deg > 45:
160:                 _add_error(errors, f"characters.json {char_id}.weapon_profile.spread_angle_deg must be within [0, 45]")
161:             if spread_jitter_deg is None or spread_jitter_deg < 0 or spread_jitter_deg > 15:
162:                 _add_error(errors, f"characters.json {char_id}.weapon_profile.spread_jitter_deg must be within [0, 15]")
163:             if projectile_hits is None or projectile_hits < 1 or projectile_hits > 8:
164:                 _add_error(errors, f"characters.json {char_id}.weapon_profile.projectile_hits must be within [1, 8]")
165:             if not isinstance(projectile_style, str) or not projectile_style:
166:                 _add_error(errors, f"characters.json {char_id}.weapon_profile.projectile_style must be non-empty string")
167: 
168:         trait_effects = row.get("trait_effects")
169:         if not isinstance(trait_effects, dict):
170:             _add_error(errors, f"characters.json {char_id}.trait_effects must be object")
171:         elif not trait_effects:
172:             _add_error(errors, f"characters.json {char_id}.trait_effects cannot be empty")
173:         else:
174:             allowed_trait_keys = {
175:                 "max_hp_bonus",
176:                 "armor_bonus",
177:                 "damage_bonus_pct",
178:                 "move_speed_mult",
179:                 "crit_chance_bonus",
180:                 "crit_multiplier_bonus",
181:                 "weapon_damage_flat",
182:                 "attack_interval_mult",
183:                 "frostbite_resistance_bonus",
184:                 "void_resistance_bonus",
185:             }
186:             for key, value in trait_effects.items():
187:                 if key not in allowed_trait_keys:
188:                     _add_error(errors, f"characters.json {char_id}.trait_effects key '{key}' is not supported")
189:                     continue
190:                 if not _is_number(value):
191:                     _add_error(errors, f"characters.json {char_id}.trait_effects['{key}'] must be numeric")
192:                     continue
193: 
194:                 value_f = float(value)
195:                 if key == "move_speed_mult" and value_f <= 0:
196:                     _add_error(errors, f"characters.json {char_id}.trait_effects['{key}'] must be > 0")
197:                 if key == "attack_interval_mult" and value_f <= 0:
198:                     _add_error(errors, f"characters.json {char_id}.trait_effects['{key}'] must be > 0")
199: 
200:         max_hp = _to_float(row.get("max_hp"))
201:         move_speed = _to_float(row.get("move_speed"))
202:         stamina_max = _to_float(row.get("stamina_max"))
203:         armor = _to_float(row.get("armor"))
204:         crit_chance = _to_float(row.get("crit_chance"))
205:         crit_multiplier = _to_float(row.get("crit_multiplier"))
206:         base_damage = _to_float(row.get("base_damage"))
207:         attack_interval = _to_float(row.get("attack_interval"))
208: 
209:         if max_hp is None or max_hp <= 0:
210:             _add_error(errors, f"characters.json {char_id}.max_hp must be > 0")
211:         if move_speed is None or move_speed <= 0:
212:             _add_error(errors, f"characters.json {char_id}.move_speed must be > 0")
213:         if stamina_max is None or stamina_max <= 0:
214:             _add_error(errors, f"characters.json {char_id}.stamina_max must be > 0")
215:         if armor is None or armor < 0.0 or armor > 0.75:
216:             _add_error(errors, f"characters.json {char_id}.armor must be within [0, 0.75]")
217:         if crit_chance is None or crit_chance < 0.0 or crit_chance > 0.95:
218:             _add_error(errors, f"characters.json {char_id}.crit_chance must be within [0, 0.95]")
219:         if crit_multiplier is None or crit_multiplier < 1.1:
220:             _add_error(errors, f"characters.json {char_id}.crit_multiplier must be >= 1.1")
221:         if base_damage is None or base_damage <= 0:
222:             _add_error(errors, f"characters.json {char_id}.base_damage must be > 0")
223:         if attack_interval is None or attack_interval <= 0:
224:             _add_error(errors, f"characters.json {char_id}.attack_interval must be > 0")
225: 
226:     if isinstance(default_id, str) and default_id and default_id not in valid_ids:
227:         _add_error(errors, f"characters.json default_character_id '{default_id}' not found in characters list")
228:     elif isinstance(default_id, str) and default_id:
229:         if unlock_type_by_id.get(default_id, "default") != "default":
230:             _add_error(errors, f"characters.json default_character_id '{default_id}' must use unlock_type 'default'")
231: 
232: 
233: def _validate_map_generation(data: dict[str, Any], errors: list[str]) -> None:
234:     room_count = data.get("room_count")
235:     layout_cols = data.get("layout_cols")
236:     chapter_order = data.get("chapter_order")
237:     chapters = data.get("chapters")
238:     fixed_rooms = data.get("fixed_rooms")
239:     base_weights = data.get("base_room_weights")
240:     chapter_mult = data.get("chapter_room_weight_mult")
241:     treasure_challenge = data.get("treasure_challenge")
242:     constraints = data.get("constraints")
243: 
244:     if not isinstance(room_count, int) or room_count < 8:
245:         _add_error(errors, "map_generation.json room_count must be int >= 8")
246:         room_count = 15
247:     if not isinstance(layout_cols, int) or layout_cols < 3:
248:         _add_error(errors, "map_generation.json layout_cols must be int >= 3")
249: 
250:     if not isinstance(chapter_order, list) or not chapter_order:
251:         _add_error(errors, "map_generation.json chapter_order must be non-empty array")
252:         chapter_order = ["chapter_1", "chapter_2", "chapter_3", "chapter_4"]
253: 
254:     if not isinstance(chapters, dict) or not chapters:
255:         _add_error(errors, "map_generation.json chapters must be non-empty object")
256:         return
257: 
258:     previous_end = 0
259:     boss_rooms: set[int] = set()
260:     for idx, chapter_id in enumerate(chapter_order):
261:         row = chapters.get(chapter_id)
262:         if not isinstance(row, dict):
263:             _add_error(errors, f"map_generation.json chapters missing '{chapter_id}'")
264:             continue
265: 
266:         chapter_index = row.get("index")
267:         start_room = row.get("start_room")
268:         end_room = row.get("end_room")
269:         intro_room = row.get("intro_room")
270:         boss_room = row.get("boss_room")
271:         boss_id = row.get("boss_id")
272: 
273:         if not isinstance(chapter_index, int) or chapter_index < 1:
274:             _add_error(errors, f"map_generation.json chapters.{chapter_id}.index must be int >= 1")
275:         if isinstance(chapter_index, int) and chapter_index != idx + 1:
276:             _add_error(errors, f"map_generation.json chapters.{chapter_id}.index should equal order position ({idx + 1})")
277: 
278:         if not isinstance(start_room, int) or not isinstance(end_room, int):
279:             _add_error(errors, f"map_generation.json chapters.{chapter_id} start/end must be ints")
280:             continue
281:         if start_room < 1 or end_room < start_room:
282:             _add_error(errors, f"map_generation.json chapters.{chapter_id} invalid room range")
283:             continue
284:         if start_room != previous_end + 1:
285:             _add_error(errors, f"map_generation.json chapters.{chapter_id}.start_room should continue previous chapter range")
286:         previous_end = end_room
287: 
288:         if not isinstance(intro_room, int) or intro_room < start_room or intro_room > end_room:
289:             _add_error(errors, f"map_generation.json chapters.{chapter_id}.intro_room must be within chapter range")
290:         if not isinstance(boss_room, int) or boss_room < start_room or boss_room > end_room:
291:             _add_error(errors, f"map_generation.json chapters.{chapter_id}.boss_room must be within chapter range")
292:         else:
293:             if boss_room in boss_rooms:
294:                 _add_error(errors, f"map_generation.json duplicate boss_room {boss_room}")
295:             boss_rooms.add(boss_room)
296:         if not isinstance(boss_id, str) or not boss_id.startswith("boss_"):
297:             _add_error(errors, f"map_generation.json chapters.{chapter_id}.boss_id must start with 'boss_'")
298: 
299:     if previous_end != room_count:
300:         _add_error(errors, "map_generation.json chapter ranges must end exactly at room_count")
301: 
302:     allowed_fixed_types = {"combat", "event", "shop", "treasure", "safe_camp", "elite"}
303:     if not isinstance(fixed_rooms, list):
304:         _add_error(errors, "map_generation.json fixed_rooms must be array")
305:     else:
306:         seen_indices: set[int] = set()
307:         for i, row in enumerate(fixed_rooms):
308:             if not isinstance(row, dict):
309:                 _add_error(errors, f"map_generation.json fixed_rooms[{i}] must be object")
310:                 continue
311:             index = row.get("index")
312:             room_type = row.get("type")
313:             if not isinstance(index, int) or index < 1 or index > room_count:
314:                 _add_error(errors, f"map_generation.json fixed_rooms[{i}].index out of range")
315:             elif index in seen_indices:
316:                 _add_error(errors, f"map_generation.json fixed_rooms duplicate index {index}")
317:             else:
318:                 seen_indices.add(index)
319:             if not isinstance(room_type, str) or room_type not in allowed_fixed_types:
320:                 _add_error(errors, f"map_generation.json fixed_rooms[{i}].type invalid")
321: 
322:     required_weight_keys = ("combat", "event", "shop", "treasure", "elite")
323:     if not isinstance(base_weights, dict) or not base_weights:
324:         _add_error(errors, "map_generation.json base_room_weights must be non-empty object")
325:     else:
326:         total = 0.0
327:         for key in required_weight_keys:
328:             weight = _to_float(base_weights.get(key))
329:             if weight is None or weight < 0:
330:                 _add_error(errors, f"map_generation.json base_room_weights.{key} must be >= 0")
331:             else:
332:                 total += weight
333:         if total <= 0:
334:             _add_error(errors, "map_generation.json base_room_weights total must be > 0")
335: 
336:     if not isinstance(chapter_mult, dict):
337:         _add_error(errors, "map_generation.json chapter_room_weight_mult must be object")
338:     else:
339:         for chapter_id in chapter_order:
340:             row = chapter_mult.get(chapter_id)
341:             if not isinstance(row, dict):
342:                 _add_error(errors, f"map_generation.json chapter_room_weight_mult missing '{chapter_id}'")
343:                 continue
344:             for key in required_weight_keys:
345:                 value = _to_float(row.get(key))
346:                 if value is None or value < 0.0 or value > 3.0:
347:                     _add_error(errors, f"map_generation.json chapter_room_weight_mult.{chapter_id}.{key} must be within [0, 3]")
348: 
349:     if treasure_challenge is not None:
350:         if not isinstance(treasure_challenge, dict):
351:             _add_error(errors, "map_generation.json treasure_challenge must be object")
352:         else:
353:             enabled = treasure_challenge.get("enabled")
354:             combat_mode = treasure_challenge.get("combat_mode")
355:             required_kills_base = treasure_challenge.get("required_kills_base")
356:             required_kills_per_room = treasure_challenge.get("required_kills_per_room")
357:             gold_reward_base = treasure_challenge.get("gold_reward_base")
358:             gold_reward_per_room = treasure_challenge.get("gold_reward_per_room")
359:             ore_reward_base = treasure_challenge.get("ore_reward_base")
360:             ore_reward_step_rooms = treasure_challenge.get("ore_reward_step_rooms")
361:             accessory_chance_base = treasure_challenge.get("accessory_chance_base")
362:             accessory_chance_vanguard = treasure_challenge.get("accessory_chance_vanguard")
363:             accessory_chance_raider = treasure_challenge.get("accessory_chance_raider")
364: 
365:             if not isinstance(enabled, bool):
366:                 _add_error(errors, "map_generation.json treasure_challenge.enabled must be bool")
367:             if not isinstance(combat_mode, str) or combat_mode not in {"elite", "normal"}:
368:                 _add_error(errors, "map_generation.json treasure_challenge.combat_mode must be 'elite' or 'normal'")
369:             if not isinstance(required_kills_base, int) or required_kills_base < 1 or required_kills_base > 20:
370:                 _add_error(errors, "map_generation.json treasure_challenge.required_kills_base must be int within [1, 20]")
371:             if not isinstance(required_kills_per_room, int) or required_kills_per_room < 0 or required_kills_per_room > 4:
372:                 _add_error(errors, "map_generation.json treasure_challenge.required_kills_per_room must be int within [0, 4]")
373:             if not isinstance(gold_reward_base, int) or gold_reward_base < 1 or gold_reward_base > 120:
374:                 _add_error(errors, "map_generation.json treasure_challenge.gold_reward_base must be int within [1, 120]")
375:             if not isinstance(gold_reward_per_room, int) or gold_reward_per_room < 0 or gold_reward_per_room > 12:
376:                 _add_error(errors, "map_generation.json treasure_challenge.gold_reward_per_room must be int within [0, 12]")
377:             if not isinstance(ore_reward_base, int) or ore_reward_base < 1 or ore_reward_base > 8:
378:                 _add_error(errors, "map_generation.json treasure_challenge.ore_reward_base must be int within [1, 8]")
379:             if not isinstance(ore_reward_step_rooms, int) or ore_reward_step_rooms < 1 or ore_reward_step_rooms > 12:
380:                 _add_error(errors, "map_generation.json treasure_challenge.ore_reward_step_rooms must be int within [1, 12]")
381: 
382:             base_chance_f = _to_float(accessory_chance_base)
383:             vanguard_chance_f = _to_float(accessory_chance_vanguard)
384:             raider_chance_f = _to_float(accessory_chance_raider)
385:             if base_chance_f is None or base_chance_f < 0.0 or base_chance_f > 1.0:
386:                 _add_error(errors, "map_generation.json treasure_challenge.accessory_chance_base must be within [0, 1]")
387:             if vanguard_chance_f is None or vanguard_chance_f < 0.0 or vanguard_chance_f > 1.0:
388:                 _add_error(errors, "map_generation.json treasure_challenge.accessory_chance_vanguard must be within [0, 1]")
389:             if raider_chance_f is None or raider_chance_f < 0.0 or raider_chance_f > 1.0:
390:                 _add_error(errors, "map_generation.json treasure_challenge.accessory_chance_raider must be within [0, 1]")
391: 
392:     if constraints is not None:
393:         if not isinstance(constraints, dict):
394:             _add_error(errors, "map_generation.json constraints must be object")
395:         else:
396:             max_consecutive = constraints.get("max_consecutive_same_type")
397:             max_treasure_per_chapter = constraints.get("max_treasure_per_chapter")
398:             max_room_type_per_chapter = constraints.get("max_room_type_per_chapter")
399:             min_room_type_per_chapter = constraints.get("min_room_type_per_chapter")
400:             if not isinstance(max_consecutive, int) or max_consecutive < 1 or max_consecutive > 5:
401:                 _add_error(errors, "map_generation.json constraints.max_consecutive_same_type must be int within [1, 5]")
402:             if not isinstance(max_treasure_per_chapter, int) or max_treasure_per_chapter < 0 or max_treasure_per_chapter > 5:
403:                 _add_error(errors, "map_generation.json constraints.max_treasure_per_chapter must be int within [0, 5]")
404: 
405:             required_cap_keys = ("event", "shop", "elite", "treasure")
406:             if not isinstance(max_room_type_per_chapter, dict) or not max_room_type_per_chapter:
407:                 _add_error(errors, "map_generation.json constraints.max_room_type_per_chapter must be non-empty object")
408:             else:
409:                 for key in required_cap_keys:
410:                     value = max_room_type_per_chapter.get(key)
411:                     if not isinstance(value, int) or value < 0 or value > room_count:
412:                         _add_error(errors, f"map_generation.json constraints.max_room_type_per_chapter.{key} must be int within [0, room_count]")
413: 
414:                 if isinstance(max_treasure_per_chapter, int):
415:                     treasure_cap = max_room_type_per_chapter.get("treasure")
416:                     if isinstance(treasure_cap, int) and treasure_cap != max_treasure_per_chapter:
417:                         _add_error(errors, "map_generation.json constraints.max_treasure_per_chapter must match max_room_type_per_chapter.treasure")
418: 
419:             required_min_keys = ("event", "shop", "elite", "treasure")
420:             if not isinstance(min_room_type_per_chapter, dict) or not min_room_type_per_chapter:
421:                 _add_error(errors, "map_generation.json constraints.min_room_type_per_chapter must be non-empty object")
422:             else:
423:                 for key in required_min_keys:
424:                     value = min_room_type_per_chapter.get(key)
425:                     if not isinstance(value, int) or value < 0 or value > room_count:
426:                         _add_error(errors, f"map_generation.json constraints.min_room_type_per_chapter.{key} must be int within [0, room_count]")
427: 
428:                     if isinstance(max_room_type_per_chapter, dict):
429:                         max_value = max_room_type_per_chapter.get(key)
430:                         if isinstance(value, int) and isinstance(max_value, int) and value > max_value:
431:                             _add_error(errors, f"map_generation.json constraints.min_room_type_per_chapter.{key} cannot exceed max_room_type_per_chapter.{key}")
432: 
433:                 if isinstance(max_treasure_per_chapter, int):
434:                     treasure_min = min_room_type_per_chapter.get("treasure")
435:                     if isinstance(treasure_min, int) and treasure_min > max_treasure_per_chapter:
436:                         _add_error(errors, "map_generation.json constraints.min_room_type_per_chapter.treasure cannot exceed max_treasure_per_chapter")
437:             for key in ("avoid_shop_near_boss", "avoid_event_near_boss"):
438:                 value = constraints.get(key)
439:                 if not isinstance(value, bool):
440:                     _add_error(errors, f"map_generation.json constraints.{key} must be bool")
441: 
442: 
443: def _validate_enemy_scaling(data: dict[str, Any], errors: list[str]) -> None:
444:     brackets = data.get("room_time_brackets")
445:     multipliers = data.get("floor_multipliers")
446:     elite_wave_interval = data.get("elite_wave_interval")
447:     type_weights = data.get("enemy_type_weights")
448:     chapter_map = data.get("chapter_archetype_map")
449:     if not isinstance(brackets, list) or not brackets:
450:         _add_error(errors, "enemy_scaling.json room_time_brackets must be a non-empty array")
451:     else:
452:         last_max = -1.0
453:         for i, row in enumerate(brackets):
454:             if not isinstance(row, dict):
455:                 _add_error(errors, f"enemy_scaling.json bracket[{i}] must be object")
456:                 continue
457:             max_seconds = row.get("max_seconds")
458:             hp_mult = row.get("hp_mult")
459:             dmg_mult = row.get("damage_mult")
460:             max_seconds_f = _to_float(max_seconds)
461:             if max_seconds_f is None:
462:                 _add_error(errors, f"enemy_scaling.json bracket[{i}].max_seconds must be > 0")
463:             elif max_seconds_f <= 0:
464:                 _add_error(errors, f"enemy_scaling.json bracket[{i}].max_seconds must be > 0")
465:             elif max_seconds_f <= last_max:
466:                 _add_error(errors, "enemy_scaling.json room_time_brackets must be strictly increasing")
467:             else:
468:                 last_max = max_seconds_f
469: 
470:             hp_mult_f = _to_float(hp_mult)
471:             if hp_mult_f is None:
472:                 _add_error(errors, f"enemy_scaling.json bracket[{i}].hp_mult must be > 0")
473:             elif hp_mult_f <= 0:
474:                 _add_error(errors, f"enemy_scaling.json bracket[{i}].hp_mult must be > 0")
475: 
476:             dmg_mult_f = _to_float(dmg_mult)
477:             if dmg_mult_f is None:
478:                 _add_error(errors, f"enemy_scaling.json bracket[{i}].damage_mult must be > 0")
479:             elif dmg_mult_f <= 0:
480:                 _add_error(errors, f"enemy_scaling.json bracket[{i}].damage_mult must be > 0")
481: 
482:     if not isinstance(multipliers, dict):
483:         _add_error(errors, "enemy_scaling.json floor_multipliers must be an object")
484:     else:
485:         for floor in range(1, 16):
486:             key = str(floor)
487:             if key not in multipliers:
488:                 _add_error(errors, f"enemy_scaling.json missing floor multiplier for floor {floor}")
489:                 continue
490:             value = multipliers[key]
491:             value_f = _to_float(value)
492:             if value_f is None:
493:                 _add_error(errors, f"enemy_scaling.json floor {floor} multiplier must be > 0")
494:             elif value_f <= 0:
495:                 _add_error(errors, f"enemy_scaling.json floor {floor} multiplier must be > 0")
496: 
497:     if not isinstance(elite_wave_interval, int) or elite_wave_interval < 3:
498:         _add_error(errors, "enemy_scaling.json elite_wave_interval must be int >= 3")
499: 
500:     required_enemy_types = ("normal", "fast", "tank", "ranged")
501:     if not isinstance(type_weights, dict):
502:         _add_error(errors, "enemy_scaling.json enemy_type_weights must be an object")
503:     else:
504:         total_weight = 0.0
505:         for enemy_type in required_enemy_types:
506:             if enemy_type not in type_weights:
507:                 _add_error(errors, f"enemy_scaling.json enemy_type_weights missing '{enemy_type}'")
508:                 continue
509:             weight_f = _to_float(type_weights.get(enemy_type))
510:             if weight_f is None:
511:                 _add_error(errors, f"enemy_scaling.json enemy_type_weights['{enemy_type}'] must be >= 0")
512:                 continue
513:             if weight_f < 0:
514:                 _add_error(errors, f"enemy_scaling.json enemy_type_weights['{enemy_type}'] must be >= 0")
515:                 continue
516:             total_weight += weight_f
517:         if total_weight <= 0:
518:             _add_error(errors, "enemy_scaling.json enemy_type_weights total must be > 0")
519: 
520:     required_enemy_types = ("normal", "fast", "tank", "ranged")
521:     if not isinstance(chapter_map, dict):
522:         _add_error(errors, "enemy_scaling.json chapter_archetype_map must be an object")
523:     else:
524:         for chapter_id in ("chapter_1", "chapter_2", "chapter_3", "chapter_4"):
525:             chapter_row = chapter_map.get(chapter_id)
526:             if not isinstance(chapter_row, dict):
527:                 _add_error(errors, f"enemy_scaling.json chapter_archetype_map missing '{chapter_id}'")
528:                 continue
529:             for enemy_type in required_enemy_types:
530:                 enemy_id = chapter_row.get(enemy_type)
531:                 if not isinstance(enemy_id, str) or not enemy_id.startswith("enemy_"):
532:                     _add_error(errors, f"enemy_scaling.json chapter_archetype_map.{chapter_id}.{enemy_type} must start with 'enemy_'")
533: 
534: 
535: def _validate_drop_tables(data: dict[str, Any], errors: list[str]) -> None:
536:     for table_name in ("normal", "elite", "boss"):
537:         table = data.get(table_name)
538:         if not isinstance(table, dict):
539:             _add_error(errors, f"drop_tables.json missing table '{table_name}'")
540:             continue
541: 
542:         guaranteed = table.get("guaranteed")
543:         weighted = table.get("weighted")
544:         if not isinstance(guaranteed, list) or not guaranteed:
545:             _add_error(errors, f"drop_tables.json {table_name}.guaranteed must be non-empty array")
546:         if not isinstance(weighted, list) or not weighted:
547:             _add_error(errors, f"drop_tables.json {table_name}.weighted must be non-empty array")
548:             continue
549: 
550:         for i, row in enumerate(weighted):
551:             if not isinstance(row, dict):
552:                 _add_error(errors, f"drop_tables.json {table_name}.weighted[{i}] must be object")
553:                 continue
554:             item_id = row.get("id")
555:             weight = row.get("weight")
556:             if not isinstance(item_id, str) or not item_id:
557:                 _add_error(errors, f"drop_tables.json {table_name}.weighted[{i}].id invalid")
558:             weight_f = _to_float(weight)
559:             if weight_f is None:
560:                 _add_error(errors, f"drop_tables.json {table_name}.weighted[{i}].weight must be > 0")
561:             elif weight_f <= 0:
562:                 _add_error(errors, f"drop_tables.json {table_name}.weighted[{i}].weight must be > 0")
563: 
564: 
565: def _validate_shop_items(data: dict[str, Any], errors: list[str]) -> None:
566:     slots = data.get("slots")
567:     restock_cost = data.get("restock_cost")
568:     restock_growth = data.get("restock_growth")
569:     restock_cost_cap = data.get("restock_cost_cap")
570:     catchup_discount = data.get("catchup_discount")
571:     ore_exchange = data.get("ore_exchange")
572:     chapter_overrides = data.get("chapter_overrides")
573:     route_style_overrides = data.get("route_style_overrides")
574:     quality_weights = data.get("quality_weights")
575:     category_weights = data.get("category_weights")
576:     pools = data.get("pools")
577: 
578:     if not isinstance(slots, int) or slots < 1:
579:         _add_error(errors, "shop_items.json slots must be int >= 1")
580:     if isinstance(slots, int) and slots > 8:
581:         _add_error(errors, "shop_items.json slots should be <= 8")
582:     if not isinstance(restock_cost, int) or restock_cost < 0:
583:         _add_error(errors, "shop_items.json restock_cost must be int >= 0")
584:     restock_growth_f = _to_float(restock_growth)
585:     if restock_growth_f is None or restock_growth_f < 0.0:
586:         _add_error(errors, "shop_items.json restock_growth must be numeric >= 0")
587:     elif restock_growth_f > 1.2:
588:         _add_error(errors, "shop_items.json restock_growth should be <= 1.2")
589:     if not isinstance(restock_cost_cap, int) or restock_cost_cap < int(restock_cost if isinstance(restock_cost, int) else 0):
590:         _add_error(errors, "shop_items.json restock_cost_cap must be int >= restock_cost")
591: 
592:     if not isinstance(catchup_discount, dict):
593:         _add_error(errors, "shop_items.json catchup_discount must be object")
594:     else:
595:         target_gold = catchup_discount.get("target_gold_per_room")
596:         max_discount = catchup_discount.get("max_discount")
597:         high_markup = catchup_discount.get("high_gold_markup")
598:         high_threshold = catchup_discount.get("high_gold_threshold_mult")
599: 
600:         target_gold_f = _to_float(target_gold)
601:         max_discount_f = _to_float(max_discount)
602:         high_markup_f = _to_float(high_markup)
603:         high_threshold_f = _to_float(high_threshold)
604: 
605:         if target_gold_f is None or target_gold_f <= 0:
606:             _add_error(errors, "shop_items.json catchup_discount.target_gold_per_room must be > 0")
607:         if max_discount_f is None or max_discount_f < 0.0 or max_discount_f > 0.75:
608:             _add_error(errors, "shop_items.json catchup_discount.max_discount must be within [0, 0.75]")
609:         if high_markup_f is None or high_markup_f < 0.0 or high_markup_f > 0.45:
610:             _add_error(errors, "shop_items.json catchup_discount.high_gold_markup must be within [0, 0.45]")
611:         if high_threshold_f is None or high_threshold_f < 1.0:
612:             _add_error(errors, "shop_items.json catchup_discount.high_gold_threshold_mult must be >= 1.0")
613: 
614:     if not isinstance(ore_exchange, dict):
615:         _add_error(errors, "shop_items.json ore_exchange must be object")
616:     else:
617:         enabled = ore_exchange.get("enabled")
618:         ore_per_trade = ore_exchange.get("ore_per_trade")
619:         gold_per_trade = ore_exchange.get("gold_per_trade")
620:         max_trades = ore_exchange.get("max_trades_per_shop")
621:         bonus_chance = ore_exchange.get("bonus_trade_chance")
622:         bonus_gold = ore_exchange.get("bonus_gold")
623: 
624:         if not isinstance(enabled, bool):
625:             _add_error(errors, "shop_items.json ore_exchange.enabled must be bool")
626:         if not isinstance(ore_per_trade, int) or ore_per_trade < 1:
627:             _add_error(errors, "shop_items.json ore_exchange.ore_per_trade must be int >= 1")
628:         if not isinstance(gold_per_trade, int) or gold_per_trade < 1:
629:             _add_error(errors, "shop_items.json ore_exchange.gold_per_trade must be int >= 1")
630:         if not isinstance(max_trades, int) or max_trades < 1:
631:             _add_error(errors, "shop_items.json ore_exchange.max_trades_per_shop must be int >= 1")
632:         bonus_chance_f = _to_float(bonus_chance)
633:         if bonus_chance_f is None or bonus_chance_f < 0.0 or bonus_chance_f > 1.0:
634:             _add_error(errors, "shop_items.json ore_exchange.bonus_trade_chance must be within [0, 1]")
635:         if not isinstance(bonus_gold, int) or bonus_gold < 0:
636:             _add_error(errors, "shop_items.json ore_exchange.bonus_gold must be int >= 0")
637: 
638:     if not isinstance(chapter_overrides, dict):
639:         _add_error(errors, "shop_items.json chapter_overrides must be object")
640:     else:
641:         expected_chapters = ("chapter_1", "chapter_2", "chapter_3", "chapter_4")
642:         for chapter_id in expected_chapters:
643:             chapter_row = chapter_overrides.get(chapter_id)
644:             if not isinstance(chapter_row, dict):
645:                 _add_error(errors, f"shop_items.json chapter_overrides.{chapter_id} must be object")
646:                 continue
647: 
648:             price_mult = _to_float(chapter_row.get("price_mult"))
649:             restock_cost_mult = _to_float(chapter_row.get("restock_cost_mult"))
650:             restock_growth_add = _to_float(chapter_row.get("restock_growth_add"))
651:             target_gold_mult = _to_float(chapter_row.get("target_gold_mult"))
652:             max_discount_add = _to_float(chapter_row.get("max_discount_add"))
653:             high_markup_add = _to_float(chapter_row.get("high_markup_add"))
654:             exchange_gold_add = chapter_row.get("ore_exchange_gold_add")
655:             exchange_trades_add = chapter_row.get("ore_exchange_max_trades_add")
656:             exchange_bonus_chance_add = _to_float(chapter_row.get("ore_exchange_bonus_chance_add"))
657:             exchange_bonus_gold_add = chapter_row.get("ore_exchange_bonus_gold_add")
658:             chapter_quality_mult = chapter_row.get("quality_weight_mult")
659:             chapter_category_mult = chapter_row.get("category_weight_mult")
660:             chapter_pool_overrides = chapter_row.get("pool_overrides")
661: 
662:             if price_mult is None or price_mult < 0.6 or price_mult > 1.6:

791: def _validate_environment_config(data: dict[str, Any], errors: list[str]) -> None:
792:     chapters = data.get("chapters")
793:     if not isinstance(chapters, dict):
794:         _add_error(errors, "environment_config.json chapters must be an object")
795:         return
796: 
797:     for chapter_key in ("chapter_1", "chapter_2", "chapter_3", "chapter_4"):
798:         row = chapters.get(chapter_key)
799:         if not isinstance(row, dict):
800:             _add_error(errors, f"environment_config.json missing '{chapter_key}'")
801:             continue
802:         if not isinstance(row.get("theme"), str) or not row["theme"]:
803:             _add_error(errors, f"environment_config.json {chapter_key}.theme invalid")
804:         hazards = row.get("hazards")
805:         if not isinstance(hazards, list) or not hazards:
806:             _add_error(errors, f"environment_config.json {chapter_key}.hazards must be non-empty array")
807:         hazard_anim_interval = _to_float(row.get("hazard_anim_interval", 0.16))
808:         if hazard_anim_interval is None or hazard_anim_interval < 0.08 or hazard_anim_interval > 0.40:
809:             _add_error(errors, f"environment_config.json {chapter_key}.hazard_anim_interval must be within [0.08, 0.40]")
810:         ambient_fx_interval = _to_float(row.get("ambient_fx_interval", 0.24))
811:         if ambient_fx_interval is None or ambient_fx_interval < 0.12 or ambient_fx_interval > 0.60:
812:             _add_error(errors, f"environment_config.json {chapter_key}.ambient_fx_interval must be within [0.12, 0.60]")
813: 
814:         visual_profile = row.get("visual_profile", {})
815:         if not isinstance(visual_profile, dict):
816:             _add_error(errors, f"environment_config.json {chapter_key}.visual_profile must be object")
817:             continue
818: 
819:         detail_tint = visual_profile.get("detail_tint", "#FFFFFF")
820:         if not _is_hex_color(detail_tint):
821:             _add_error(errors, f"environment_config.json {chapter_key}.visual_profile.detail_tint must be hex color string")
822: 
823:         detail_alpha = _to_float(visual_profile.get("detail_alpha", 0.65))
824:         if detail_alpha is None or detail_alpha < 0.20 or detail_alpha > 1.00:
825:             _add_error(errors, f"environment_config.json {chapter_key}.visual_profile.detail_alpha must be within [0.20, 1.00]")
826: 
827:         detail_pulse_speed = _to_float(visual_profile.get("detail_pulse_speed", 0.0))
828:         if detail_pulse_speed is None or detail_pulse_speed < 0.0 or detail_pulse_speed > 6.0:
829:             _add_error(errors, f"environment_config.json {chapter_key}.visual_profile.detail_pulse_speed must be within [0.0, 6.0]")
830: 
831:         detail_pulse_amplitude = _to_float(visual_profile.get("detail_pulse_amplitude", 0.0))
832:         if detail_pulse_amplitude is None or detail_pulse_amplitude < 0.0 or detail_pulse_amplitude > 0.25:
833:             _add_error(errors, f"environment_config.json {chapter_key}.visual_profile.detail_pulse_amplitude must be within [0.0, 0.25]")
834: 
835:         hazard_alpha_mult = _to_float(visual_profile.get("hazard_alpha_mult", 1.0))
836:         if hazard_alpha_mult is None or hazard_alpha_mult < 0.40 or hazard_alpha_mult > 1.60:
837:             _add_error(errors, f"environment_config.json {chapter_key}.visual_profile.hazard_alpha_mult must be within [0.40, 1.60]")
838: 
839:         ambient_alpha_mult = _to_float(visual_profile.get("ambient_alpha_mult", 1.0))
840:         if ambient_alpha_mult is None or ambient_alpha_mult < 0.40 or ambient_alpha_mult > 1.60:
841:             _add_error(errors, f"environment_config.json {chapter_key}.visual_profile.ambient_alpha_mult must be within [0.40, 1.60]")
842: 
843:         ambient_wave_speed = _to_float(visual_profile.get("ambient_wave_speed", 0.0))
844:         if ambient_wave_speed is None or ambient_wave_speed < 0.0 or ambient_wave_speed > 6.0:
845:             _add_error(errors, f"environment_config.json {chapter_key}.visual_profile.ambient_wave_speed must be within [0.0, 6.0]")
846: 
847:         ambient_wave_amplitude = _to_float(visual_profile.get("ambient_wave_amplitude", 0.0))
848:         if ambient_wave_amplitude is None or ambient_wave_amplitude < 0.0 or ambient_wave_amplitude > 0.25:
849:             _add_error(errors, f"environment_config.json {chapter_key}.visual_profile.ambient_wave_amplitude must be within [0.0, 0.25]")
850: 
851:         ambient_scroll_speed_x = _to_float(visual_profile.get("ambient_scroll_speed_x", 0.0))
852:         if ambient_scroll_speed_x is None or ambient_scroll_speed_x < -8.0 or ambient_scroll_speed_x > 8.0:

857:             _add_error(errors, f"environment_config.json {chapter_key}.visual_profile.ambient_scroll_speed_y must be within [-8.0, 8.0]")

190:     profile_policy = resource_acceptance_targets.get("acceptance_profile_policy", {})

206:         return 1

234:             print(f"resource_acceptance_targets.json trend_baseline.bucket_ready_ratio_min.{bucket} must be within [0.1, 1.0]")
235:             return 1

239:         print("resource_acceptance_targets.json trend_baseline.max_category_ratio_drop must be within [0.0, 1.0]")

253:         return 1

309:     for category in required_categories:
310:         entries = categories.get(category, [])
311:         if not isinstance(entries, list) or not entries:
312:             print(f"resource_catalog.json categories.{category} must be a non-empty array")
313:             return 1
314: 
315:         visual_rows = scene_visual_requirements.get(category, [])
316:         smoke_scenes = scene_matrix.get(category, [])
317:         if not isinstance(smoke_scenes, list) or not smoke_scenes:
318:             print(f"resource_acceptance_targets.json acceptance_scene_matrix.{category} must be a non-empty array")
319:             return 1

321:             print(
322:                 f"resource_acceptance_targets.json acceptance_scene_matrix.{category} "
323:                 f"must include at least {min_scene_smokes_per_category} scenes"

325:             return 1
326:         for idx, scene_path in enumerate(smoke_scenes):
327:             if not isinstance(scene_path, str) or not scene_path.startswith("res://"):
328:                 print(f"resource_acceptance_targets.json acceptance_scene_matrix.{category}[{idx}] must be res:// path")
329:                 return 1

331:             if not scene_disk_path.exists():
332:                 print(f"resource_acceptance_targets.json acceptance_scene_matrix scene target missing: {scene_path}")
333:                 return 1

335:         if not isinstance(visual_rows, list) or not visual_rows:
336:             print(f"resource_acceptance_targets.json scene_visual_requirements.{category} must be a non-empty array")
337:             return 1
338:         if len(visual_rows) < min_visual_checks_per_category:
339:             print(
340:                 f"resource_acceptance_targets.json scene_visual_requirements.{category} "
341:                 f"must include at least {min_visual_checks_per_category} checks"
342:             )
343:             return 1

345:         if not isinstance(catalog_visual_rows, list) or len(catalog_visual_rows) != len(visual_rows):
346:             print(f"resource_catalog.json scene_visual_requirements.{category} mismatch with targets")
347:             return 1

350:             return 1
351:         for idx, visual_row in enumerate(visual_rows):
352:             if not isinstance(visual_row, dict):
353:                 print(f"resource_acceptance_targets.json scene_visual_requirements.{category}[{idx}] must be object")
354:                 return 1
355:             scene_path = visual_row.get("scene")
356:             node_path = visual_row.get("node_path")
357:             node_type = visual_row.get("node_type")
358:             rule = visual_row.get("rule")
359:             prop = visual_row.get("property")
360:             if not isinstance(scene_path, str) or not scene_path.startswith("res://"):
361:                 print(f"resource_acceptance_targets.json scene_visual_requirements.{category}[{idx}].scene must be res:// path")
362:                 return 1
363:             if not isinstance(node_path, str) or not node_path:
364:                 print(f"resource_acceptance_targets.json scene_visual_requirements.{category}[{idx}].node_path must be non-empty string")
365:                 return 1
366:             if not isinstance(node_type, str) or not node_type:
367:                 print(f"resource_acceptance_targets.json scene_visual_requirements.{category}[{idx}].node_type must be non-empty string")
368:                 return 1
369:             if not isinstance(rule, str) or rule not in allowed_visual_rules:
370:                 print(f"resource_acceptance_targets.json scene_visual_requirements.{category}[{idx}].rule invalid")
371:                 return 1
372:             if rule != "exists" and (not isinstance(prop, str) or not prop):
373:                 print(f"resource_acceptance_targets.json scene_visual_requirements.{category}[{idx}].property required when rule != exists")
374:                 return 1
375:             scene_disk_path = root / scene_path.replace("res://", "")
376:             if not scene_disk_path.exists():
377:                 print(f"resource_acceptance_targets.json visual scene target missing: {scene_path}")
378:                 return 1
379: 
380:         ready_count = 0
381:         category_tier_count = {"candidate": 0, "ready": 0}
382: 
383:         for entry in entries:
384:             if not isinstance(entry, dict):
385:                 print(f"resource_catalog.json categories.{category} entry must be object")
386:                 return 1
387: 
388:             resource_id = entry.get("id")
389:             resource_path = entry.get("path")
390:             source_json_path = entry.get("source_json")
391:             material_profile = entry.get("material_profile")
392:             asset_state = entry.get("asset_state")
393:             preview_texture = entry.get("preview_texture")
394:             acceptance_scene = entry.get("acceptance_scene")
395:             acceptance_profile = entry.get("acceptance_profile")
396:             acceptance_tier = entry.get("acceptance_tier")
397: 
398:             if not isinstance(resource_id, str) or not resource_id:
399:                 print(f"resource_catalog.json categories.{category} entry id must be non-empty string")
400:                 return 1
401:             if not isinstance(resource_path, str) or not resource_path.startswith("res://resources/"):
402:                 print(f"resource_catalog.json categories.{category} entry path must start with res://resources/")
403:                 return 1
404:             if not isinstance(source_json_path, str) or not source_json_path.startswith("res://"):
405:                 print(f"resource_catalog.json categories.{category} entry source_json must start with res://")
406:                 return 1

409:                 return 1
410:             if asset_state not in {"production_candidate", "production_ready"}:

415:                 return 1

419:             if not isinstance(acceptance_profile, str) or not acceptance_profile:
420:                 print(f"resource_catalog.json categories.{category} entry acceptance_profile must be non-empty string")
421:                 return 1
422:             if not isinstance(acceptance_tier, str) or acceptance_tier not in {"candidate", "ready"}:
423:                 print(f"resource_catalog.json categories.{category} entry acceptance_tier must be candidate or ready")
424:                 return 1

426:             profile_row = profiles.get(acceptance_profile)

428:                 print(f"resource_catalog.json categories.{category} entry acceptance_profile must reference acceptance_profile_policy.profiles")
429:                 return 1
430:             profile_tier = profile_row.get("tier")
431:             if profile_tier != acceptance_tier:
432:                 print(f"resource_catalog.json categories.{category} entry acceptance_tier must match profile tier")
433:                 return 1
434:             report_bucket = profile_row.get("report_bucket")
435:             if not isinstance(report_bucket, str) or not report_bucket:
436:                 print(f"resource_catalog.json categories.{category} entry acceptance_profile report_bucket must be non-empty string")
437:                 return 1
438: 
439:             state_profile_row = category_profile_map.get(category, {})
440:             if not isinstance(state_profile_row, dict):
441:                 print(f"resource_acceptance_targets.json acceptance_profile_policy.category_profile_map.{category} must be object")
442:                 return 1
443:             expected_profile = state_profile_row.get(asset_state)
444:             if isinstance(expected_profile, str) and expected_profile and expected_profile != acceptance_profile:
445:                 print(f"resource_catalog.json categories.{category} entry acceptance_profile must match category_profile_map for {asset_state}")
446:                 return 1
447: 
448:             if asset_state == "production_ready":
449:                 ready_count += 1
450:                 if acceptance_tier != required_ready_profile_tier:
451:                     print(f"resource_catalog.json categories.{category} production_ready entry acceptance_tier must be {required_ready_profile_tier}")
452:                     return 1
453: 
454:             category_tier_count[acceptance_tier] = int(category_tier_count.get(acceptance_tier, 0)) + 1
455:             if report_bucket not in computed_bucket_counts:

457:                     "entries": 0,
458:                     "ready_entries": 0,

460:             computed_bucket_counts[report_bucket]["entries"] = int(computed_bucket_counts[report_bucket].get("entries", 0)) + 1

463: 
464:             resource_disk_path = root / resource_path.replace("res://", "")
465:             if not resource_disk_path.exists():
466:                 print(f"Resource stub missing from catalog path: {resource_path}")

468: 
469:             try:
470:                 resource_text = resource_disk_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
471:             except Exception as exc:
472:                 print(f"Cannot read resource stub {resource_path}: {exc}")
473:                 return 1
474: 
475:             if f'id = "{resource_id}"' not in resource_text:
476:                 print(f"Resource stub id mismatch: {resource_path}")
477:                 return 1
478:             if f'source_json = "{source_json_path}"' not in resource_text:
479:                 print(f"Resource stub source_json mismatch: {resource_path}")

482:                 print(f"Resource stub material_profile mismatch: {resource_path}")

498:                 return 1
499: 
500:             source_disk_path = root / source_json_path.replace("res://", "")
501:             if not source_disk_path.exists():
502:                 print(f"Resource stub source_json target missing: {source_json_path} (from {resource_path})")
503:                 return 1
504: 
505:             material_profile_disk_path = root / material_profile.replace("res://", "")
506:             if not material_profile_disk_path.exists():

518:                 return 1

520:         if production_ready_counts.get(category) != ready_count:
521:             print(f"resource_catalog.json production_ready_counts.{category} mismatch with categorized entries")
522:             return 1
523:         entry_count = len(entries)
524:         expected_ratio = float(ready_count) / float(entry_count) if entry_count > 0 else 0.0
525:         ratio_value = production_ready_ratio_by_category.get(category)
526:         if not isinstance(ratio_value, (int, float)):
527:             print(f"resource_catalog.json production_ready_ratio_by_category.{category} must be number")
528:             return 1
529:         if abs(float(ratio_value) - expected_ratio) > 0.0001:
530:             print(f"resource_catalog.json production_ready_ratio_by_category.{category} mismatch with categorized entries")
531:             return 1
532: 
533:         tier_count_row = acceptance_tier_counts.get(category)
534:         if not isinstance(tier_count_row, dict):
535:             print(f"resource_catalog.json acceptance_tier_counts.{category} must be object")
536:             return 1
537:         if tier_count_row.get("candidate") != category_tier_count["candidate"]:
538:             print(f"resource_catalog.json acceptance_tier_counts.{category}.candidate mismatch with categorized entries")
539:             return 1
540:         if tier_count_row.get("ready") != category_tier_count["ready"]:
541:             print(f"resource_catalog.json acceptance_tier_counts.{category}.ready mismatch with categorized entries")
542:             return 1
543: 
544:     for bucket, row in computed_bucket_counts.items():
545:         catalog_row = acceptance_bucket_counts.get(bucket)
546:         if not isinstance(catalog_row, dict):
547:             print(f"resource_catalog.json acceptance_bucket_counts.{bucket} must be object")
548:             return 1
549:         if catalog_row.get("entries") != row["entries"]:
550:             print(f"resource_catalog.json acceptance_bucket_counts.{bucket}.entries mismatch with categorized entries")
551:             return 1
552:         if catalog_row.get("ready_entries") != row["ready_entries"]:
553:             print(f"resource_catalog.json acceptance_bucket_counts.{bucket}.ready_entries mismatch with categorized entries")

6: func _load_json_dict(path: String) -> Dictionary:
7: 	var file := FileAccess.open(path, FileAccess.READ)

9: 	if file == null:
10: 		return {}

12: 	var parsed: Variant = JSON.parse_string(file.get_as_text())

15: 		return parsed
16: 	return {}

87: 		assert_lte(float(profile.get("max_luma_delta", -1.0)), 1.0, "%s max_luma_delta should be <= 1" % profile_name)

<path>D:\Desktop\Project\Game\angel-fallen\.github\workflows\ci.yml</path>
<type>file</type>
<content>1: name: CI
2: 
3: on:
4:   push:
5:     branches:
6:       - "**"
7:   pull_request:
8: 
9: jobs:
10:   validate-config-and-resources:
11:     name: Validate Config and Resources
12:     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
13:     steps:
14:       - name: Checkout repository
15:         uses: actions/checkout@v4
16:         with:
17:           lfs: true
18: 
19:       - name: Set up Python
20:         uses: actions/setup-python@v5
21:         with:
22:           python-version: "3.11"
23: 
24:       - name: JSON syntax gate
25:         run: python scripts/tools/check_json_syntax.py
26: 
27:       - name: Validate JSON configs
28:         run: python scripts/validate_configs.py
29: 
30:       - name: Check resource structure
31:         run: python scripts/check_resources.py
32: 
33:   godot-headless-and-gut:
34:     name: Godot Headless and GUT (${{ matrix.os }})
35:     runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
36:     strategy:
37:       fail-fast: false
38:       matrix:
39:         include:
40:           - os: ubuntu-latest
41:             backend_tag: linux_headless
42:           - os: windows-latest
43:             backend_tag: windows_headless
44:     steps:
45:       - name: Checkout repository
46:         uses: actions/checkout@v4
47:         with:
48:           lfs: true
49: 
50:       - name: Set up Godot
51:         uses: chickensoft-games/setup-godot@v2
52:         with:
53:           version: 4.6.1
54: 
55:       - name: Import project (build class cache)
56:         run: godot --headless --path . --import
57: 
58:       - name: Headless startup check
59:         run: godot --headless --path . --quit
60: 
61:       - name: Run GUT tests
62:         run: godot --headless --path . -s addons/gut/gut_cmdln.gd -gdir=res://test -ginclude_subdirs -gexit
63: 
64:       - name: Run quality baseline snapshot
65:         run: godot --headless --path . -s res://scripts/tools/run_quality_baseline.gd
66: 
67:       - name: Run release gate rehearsal
68:         run: godot --headless --path . -s res://scripts/tools/run_release_gate.gd
69: 
70:       - name: Run compatibility rehearsal
71:         run: godot --headless --path . -s res://scripts/tools/run_compatibility_rehearsal.gd
72: 
73:       - name: Run resource acceptance rehearsal (scene visuals)
74:         run: godot --headless --path . -s res://scripts/tools/run_resource_acceptance.gd
75: 
76:       - name: Run resource acceptance trend+visual gate
77:         run: godot --headless --path . -s res://scripts/tools/run_resource_acceptance.gd
78: 
79:       - name: Run visual snapshot regression rehearsal
80:         env:
81:           VISUAL_PIPELINE_ID: ${{ github.run_id }}-${{ github.run_attempt }}-${{ matrix.backend_tag }}-rehearsal
82:           VISUAL_SNAPSHOT_BACKEND_TAG: ${{ matrix.backend_tag }}
83:           VISUAL_SNAPSHOT_BACKEND_MATRIX: linux_headless,windows_headless
84:           VISUAL_SNAPSHOT_STRATEGY: ci_rehearsal
85:           VISUAL_SNAPSHOT_RUN_MODE: rehearsal
86:         run: godot --headless --path . -s res://scripts/tools/run_visual_snapshot_regression.gd
87: 
88:       - name: Run visual snapshot regression trend gate
89:         env:
90:           VISUAL_PIPELINE_ID: ${{ github.run_id }}-${{ github.run_attempt }}-${{ matrix.backend_tag }}-trend-gate
91:           VISUAL_SNAPSHOT_BACKEND_TAG: ${{ matrix.backend_tag }}
92:           VISUAL_SNAPSHOT_BACKEND_MATRIX: linux_headless,windows_headless
93:           VISUAL_SNAPSHOT_STRATEGY: ci_trend_gate
94:           VISUAL_SNAPSHOT_RUN_MODE: trend_gate
95:         run: godot --headless --path . -s res://scripts/tools/run_visual_snapshot_regression.gd
96: 
97:       - name: Run visual snapshot release-candidate template
98:         env:
99:           VISUAL_PIPELINE_ID: ${{ github.run_id }}-${{ github.run_attempt }}-${{ matrix.backend_tag }}-release-candidate
100:           VISUAL_SNAPSHOT_BACKEND_TAG: ${{ matrix.backend_tag }}
101:           VISUAL_SNAPSHOT_BACKEND_MATRIX: linux_headless,windows_headless
102:           VISUAL_SNAPSHOT_STRATEGY: release_candidate
103:           VISUAL_SNAPSHOT_RUN_MODE: release_candidate
104:         run: godot --headless --path . -s res://scripts/tools/run_visual_snapshot_regression.gd
105: 
106:       - name: Run visual snapshot release-blocking template
107:         env:
108:           VISUAL_PIPELINE_ID: ${{ github.run_id }}-${{ github.run_attempt }}-${{ matrix.backend_tag }}-release-blocking
109:           VISUAL_SNAPSHOT_BACKEND_TAG: ${{ matrix.backend_tag }}
110:           VISUAL_SNAPSHOT_BACKEND_MATRIX: linux_headless,windows_headless
111:           VISUAL_SNAPSHOT_STRATEGY: release_blocking
112:           VISUAL_SNAPSHOT_RUN_MODE: release_blocking
113:         run: godot --headless --path . -s res://scripts/tools/run_visual_snapshot_regression.gd

(End of file - total 113 lines)
</content>

**Output:**
```
<path>D:\Desktop\Project\Game\angel-fallen\README.md</path>
<type>file</type>
<content>1: # angel-fallen
2: 
3: Angel Fallen is a top-down 2D action roguelike built with Godot 4.
4: 
5: Current playable prototype includes:
6: - Main menu -> game scene transition
7: - Player movement, sprint, stamina
8: - Auto-attack combat against spawned enemies
9: - Enemy archetype system (normal/fast/tank/ranged) with chapter-based archetype mapping and elite wave injections
10: - Enemy object pooling (spawn/acquire/release/reset) to reduce allocation spikes in dense rooms
11: - Run-plan driven room generation (chapter-aware room metadata from `map_generation.json`)
12: - Treasure rooms generated by run-plan metadata (elite cache challenge -> loot payout, with per-chapter room-type caps for event/shop/elite/treasure)
13: - Room combat flow (clear room then press `E` for next)
14: - XP leveling with 3-choice level-up panel
15: - Shop room purchases and safe-camp forge/route choices
16: - Shop economy assist system (chapter-aware pricing profile, catch-up discount, high-gold markup, escalating restock, chapter-weighted quality/category bias)
17: - Boss progression now follows generated run-plan chapter metadata (default still 15-room MVP pacing)
18: - Boss phase behavior (dash + pulse) driven by HP thresholds
19: - Chapter-based environment hazards (water/spore/lava/ice/void) with status gauges
20: - Hazard visual feedback (chapter tint + damage flash) and boss-room hazard amplification
21: - Main gameplay scene visual baseline migrated to TileMap layers backed by resource tilesets (chapter ground + chapter-specific door block states)
22: - Main gameplay scene now includes a chapter-specific ground-detail TileMap layer for decorative sigils, cracks, frost marks, and void glyphs
23: - Hazard overlay visual layer migrated to resource-backed TileMap with chapter-specific overlay tilesets (hazard intensity drives overlay alpha)
24: - Hazard overlay now supports chapter-specific animation cadence (`hazard_anim_interval`) with atlas variant cycling
25: - Main gameplay scene now includes a chapter-specific ambient FX TileMap layer with atlas-cycled glow glyphs (`ambient_fx_interval` driven)
26: - Chapter visual profiles now drive detail tint/alpha pulse and ambient FX scroll/wave cadence (`visual_profile` in `environment_config.json`)
27: - Tile atlases are now generated in a handdrawn profile (`handdrawn_v1`) with an `atlas_manifest.json` snapshot for pipeline traceability
28: - Content-depth cycle D18 expanded roster/evolution/shop/memory coverage (characters 12, evolutions 13, shop passive 14, shop weapon 15, memory fragments 22)
29: - Resource directory families now use a mixed ready/candidate catalog baseline (`stub_catalog_v8`) with material-profile mapping plus preview/acceptance metadata, and batch-6 `production_ready` IDs validated via ratio + cross-scene smoke + scene-visual checks (including `bool_true`) with acceptance-profile tier semantics and layered trend baselines
30: - D36 visual snapshot regression chain now adds approval-threshold template orchestration and release-candidate tracking (`approval_threshold_templates` + `release_candidate_tracking`) on top of approval history archive aggregation (`approval_history_archive`), approval audit persistence (`approval_audit_trail`), backend matrix governance + approval workflow hard gates (`backend_matrix_governance` + `approval_workflow`), release template manifest governance (`release_gate_templates`), strategy orchestration (`strategy_orchestration`), exception lifecycle governance (`exception_lifecycle`), cross-backend regression attribution (`backend_attribution`), whitelist convergence automation (`whitelist_convergence`), required snapshot alignment, backend capture-mode governance, whitelist-governed diff tolerance, precision convergence, cross-version baseline drift controls, and layered report convergence gates
31: - D30-1 adds a fast JSON syntax gate (`scripts/tools/check_json_syntax.py`) for all balance/catalog/atlas JSON files, enabling fail-fast parse diagnostics before semantic validators and heavier rehearsals
32: - Meta progression save with run summary rewards
33: - Route-based victory ending unlock and achievement tracking
34: - Run result panel with ending/achievement unlock summary
35: - Main menu meta-upgrade shop (permanent run-start bonuses)
36: - Chapter transition narrative panel after boss rooms (route choice impacts alignment)
37: - Data-driven narrative content config (`data/balance/narrative_content.json`)
38: - Chapter intro panel now follows run-plan intro markers (default 1/5/9/13)
39: - Narrative event rooms (chapter event choices with resource/route consequences)
40: - Narrative choices can attach lasting chapter effects (2-3 rooms of buffs/curses)
41: - Event branch selection now uses weighted routing (alignment + unlocked endings)
42: - Memory fragments unlocked from chapter bosses and tracked in meta save
43: - Safe-camp Memory Altar panel supports in-run fragment review
44: - Blessing system now safely swaps (no unintended stacking from repeated choices)
45: - Run result panel includes a narrative-choice timeline summary
46: - Ending unlock now includes epilogue text (first unlock vs repeat cycle variants)
47: - Main menu memory archive can cycle unlocked fragment full text
48: - Main menu character selection (Knight/Mage/Rogue) with persisted last pick
49: - Each character has a unique starting trait (Bulwark / Arcane Overload / Shadowstep)
50: - Character unlock rules: Knight starts unlocked, Mage unlocks via Redeem ending, Rogue unlocks via `ach_slayer_120`
51: - Character weapon profile is data-driven (single/spread, projectile count, spread angle, random jitter, pierce hits, visual style)
52: - Weapon evolution option now appears in level-up panel when recipe conditions are met (weapon + passive level)
53: - Main menu Codex overlay tracks all categories with catalog progress (locked + unlocked + unlock hints)
54: 
55: ## Run
56: 
57: ```bash
58: godot --path . scenes/main_menu/main_menu.tscn
59: ```
60: 
61: ## Run tests (GUT)
62: 
63: ```bash
64: # all tests
65: godot --headless -s addons/gut/gut_cmdln.gd -gdir=res://test -ginclude_subdirs -gexit
66: 
67: # unit tests only
68: godot --headless -s addons/gut/gut_cmdln.gd -gdir=res://test/unit -ginclude_subdirs -gexit
69: 
70: # integration tests only
71: godot --headless -s addons/gut/gut_cmdln.gd -gdir=res://test/integration -ginclude_subdirs -gexit
72: ```
73: 
74: ## Run quality baseline snapshot
75: 
76: ```bash
77: godot --headless --path . -s res://scripts/tools/run_quality_baseline.gd
78: ```
79: 
80: Outputs:
81: - `user://quality_baseline_latest.json`
82: - `user://quality_baseline_latest.md`
83:

133: 
134: Visual snapshot regression validates chapter/world+UI snapshot metric baselines (`opaque_ratio` / `unique_colors` / `avg_luma`), required baseline snapshot coverage + backend capture-mode alignment, multi-round precision convergence (`sample_rounds` + stddev bounds), backend-profiled tolerance (`default/linux_headless/windows_headless`), whitelist-governed diff tolerances (`diff_whitelist` + `whitelist_policy`), cross-version reference drift controls (`cross_version_baseline`), layer-level convergence gates (`report_layers`), cross-backend regression attribution limits (`backend_attribution`), whitelist convergence suggestions (`whitelist_convergence`), exception lifecycle governance (`exception_lifecycle`: expire idle entries + auto reclaim candidates), strategy-template orchestration (`strategy_orchestration`: `ci_rehearsal` / `ci_trend_gate` / release profiles), release template manifest governance (`release_gate_templates`: required strategy-template bindings + CI run_mode bindings + publish checklist), backend matrix governance (`backend_matrix_governance`: required backend matrix + run mode coverage), approval workflow constraints (`approval_workflow`: required report sections + strategy-level zero blocker/warning policy), approval audit trail persistence (`approval_audit_trail`: history persistence + run-mode/backend coverage + pipeline-id trace checks), approval history archive aggregation (`approval_history_archive`: rolling-window archive aggregation + cross-backend warning/blocker delta limits), approval-threshold template application (`approval_threshold_templates`: run-mode template overrides for workflow/audit/archive gates), release-candidate tracking (`release_candidate_tracking`: windowed candidate stability checks), and trend-drop limits.
135:
